```{r}
  #                                       "_T2DvsLC_interaction_maineffect_2000.png"))
  #   png(plot_file_group, width = 3000, height = 2100, res = 300)
  #   print(volcano_plot_group)
  #   dev.off()
  #   
  #   cat("Main effect plot saved:", plot_file_group, "\n")
  # }
  # 
  # # Create volcano plot for interaction effect
  # interaction_logfc_col <- grep("^logFC_.*:.*treatment", names(full_results), value = TRUE)[1]
  # interaction_pval_col <- grep("^p_.*:.*treatment", names(full_results), value = TRUE)[1]
  # interaction_fdr_col <- grep("^fdr_.*:.*treatment", names(full_results), value = TRUE)[1]
  # interaction_pval10_col <- grep("^PValue10_.*:.*treatment", names(full_results), value = TRUE)[1]
  # 
  # if (!is.na(interaction_logfc_col) && !is.na(interaction_pval10_col)) {
  #   full_results$color_interaction <- ifelse(full_results[[interaction_fdr_col]] < 0.05 & full_results[[interaction_logfc_col]] > 0, "#990000",
  #                                            ifelse(full_results[[interaction_fdr_col]] < 0.05 & full_results[[interaction_logfc_col]] < 0, "#003366", "gray"))
  #   
  #   significant_df_interaction <- full_results[full_results[[interaction_fdr_col]] < 0.05, ]
  #   
  #   volcano_plot_interaction <- ggplot(full_results, aes(x = .data[[interaction_logfc_col]], y = .data[[interaction_pval10_col]], color = color_interaction)) +
  #     geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  #     scale_color_identity() +
  #     theme_minimal() +
  #     labs(
  #       title = paste("T2D x Treatment Interaction Effect -", cell_name),
  #       subtitle = "Organoids, Interaction Term (REML, Log Normal, Offset)",
  #       x = "Log Fold Change (Interaction)",
  #       y = "-log10(P-Value)",
  #       color = "FC Direction",
  #       caption = paste0("FDR < 0.05, Genes = ", Genes, 
  #                        ", Cells = ", Cells, 
  #                        ", Non-Convergence Rate: ", Nonconvergence_Rate,
  #                        ", Genes Filtered for Low Expression: ", low_exp)
  #     ) +
  #     theme(
  #       plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
  #       axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1)
  #     ) +
  #     xlim(-3, 3) +
  #     geom_text(data = significant_df_interaction, aes(label = Gene),
  #               vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE, color = "black")
  #   
  #   plot_file_interaction <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
  #                                      paste0("Plot_Organoid_NEBULA_", cell_name_clean, 
  #                                             "_T2DvsLC_interaction_effect_2000.png"))
  #   png(plot_file_interaction, width = 3000, height = 2100, res = 300)
  #   print(volcano_plot_interaction)
  #   dev.off()
  #   
  #   cat("Interaction effect plot saved:", plot_file_interaction, "\n\n")
  # }
}

cat("\n=== NEBULA Analysis Complete ===\n")

#Load in all the celltype results & make a nice figure for interaction term
# Initialize empty list to store results
all_results_interaction <- list()
celltypes <- unique(so_combined$cell_type_abbrev)

for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  input_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
                          paste0("NEBULA_T2DvsLC_interaction_", cell_name_clean, 
                                 "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  
  # Check if file exists before reading
  if (file.exists(input_file)) {
    file <- read.csv(input_file)
    file$cell_type <- cell_name  # Add cell type column
    all_results_interaction[[cell_name]] <- file
    cat("Loaded:", cell_name, "- Genes:", nrow(file), "\n")
  } else {
    cat("File not found:", input_file, "\n")
  }
}

# Combine all results into one dataframe
combined_results_interaction <- bind_rows(all_results_interaction)

# Count positive and negative DE genes per cell type for INTERACTION term
de_summary_interaction <- combined_results_interaction %>%
  filter(`fdr_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30` < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(`logFC_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30` > 0, "Positive", "Negative")) %>%
  group_by(cell_type, direction) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(direction == "Negative", -count, count))

# Create the plot for interaction term
p_interaction <- ggplot(de_summary_interaction, aes(x = count, y = reorder(cell_type, abs(count)), fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Negative" = "#A8C9D9", "Positive" = "#E89A9A")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 9.5, linetype = "dotted", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Number of DE genes (Interaction: T2D x Treatment)", 
       y = NULL,
       fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.2, "cm"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-500, -250, 0, 250, 500),
                     labels = c(500, 250, 0, 250, 500),
                     limits = c(-600, 600))

# Save the interaction plot
ggsave("/home/hhampson/Results/DE_genes_by_celltype_interaction_barplot.png", 
       plot = p_interaction,
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Count positive and negative DE genes per cell type for TREATMENT30 main effect
de_summary_treatment <- combined_results_interaction %>%
  filter(fdr_groupType.2.Diabetes < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC_groupType.2.Diabetes > 0, "Positive", "Negative")) %>%
  group_by(cell_type, direction) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(direction == "Negative", -count, count))

# Create the plot for groupType.2.Diabetes main effect
p_group <- ggplot(de_summary_treatment, aes(x = count, y = reorder(cell_type, abs(count)), fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Negative" = "#A8C9D9", "Positive" = "#E89A9A")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 9.5, linetype = "dotted", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Number of DE genes (Group: Type 2 Diabetes vs Lean Control)", 
       y = NULL,
       fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.2, "cm"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-500, -250, 0, 250, 500),
                     labels = c(500, 250, 0, 250, 500),
                     limits = c(-600, 600))

# Save the treatment plot
ggsave("/home/hhampson/Results/DE_genes_by_celltype_groupType.2.Diabetes_barplot.png", 
       plot = p_group,
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Print summaries
cat("\n=== Interaction Term Summary ===\n")
print(de_summary_interaction %>% arrange(desc(abs(count))))

cat("\n=== groupType.2.Diabetes Main Effect Summary ===\n")
print(de_summary_treatment %>% arrange(desc(abs(count))))

# Calculate total absolute DEGs per cell type
cell_type_order <- de_summary_interaction %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(total_degs = sum(abs(count))) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_degs)) %>%
  pull(cell_type)

print(cell_type_order)
```
####2. Targeted Celltypes
###i. Plot Interaction Term - Volcano Plot
```{r}

celltypes <- c("ProlPod","DT","EEC","MesV")
# Open PDF
pdf("/home/hhampson/Results/T2DvsLC_Interaction_Volcano_AllCelltypes.pdf", 
    width = 8, height = 8)
for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  input_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
                          paste0("NEBULA_T2DvsLC_interaction_", cell_name_clean, 
                                 "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  
  # "~/Results/NEBULA_T2DvsLC_interaction_ProlPod_unadjusted_2000.csv"
  if (!file.exists(input_file)) {
    cat("File not found:", input_file, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  cat("\n=== Processing:", cell_name, "===\n")
  full_results <- read.csv(input_file)
  
  # Simple categorization based on interaction term
  results <- full_results %>%
    mutate(
      # Interaction coefficient
      Interaction = `logFC_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30`,
      Interaction_pval = `p_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30`,
      Interaction_fdr = `fdr_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30`,
      Interaction_pval10 = `PValue10_groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30`,
      
      # Two categories
      category = case_when(
        Interaction_fdr < 0.05 & Interaction > 0 ~ "More reactive in T2D",
        Interaction_fdr < 0.05 & Interaction < 0 ~ "Less reactive in T2D",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      ),
      
      # Two colors
      color = case_when(
        category == "More reactive in T2D" ~ "#990000",  # Dark red
        category == "Less reactive in T2D" ~ "#003366",   # Dark blue
        TRUE ~ "#D3D3D3"                                  # Gray
      )
    )
  
  # Dynamic axis limits
  interaction_range <- range(results$Interaction, na.rm = TRUE)
  interaction_padding <- diff(interaction_range) * 0.1
  # xlim_min <- interaction_range[1] - interaction_padding
  xlim_min <- -3
  # xlim_max <- interaction_range[2] + interaction_padding
  xlim_max <- 3
  
  pval_max <- max(results$Interaction_pval10, na.rm = TRUE)
  ylim_max <- pval_max * 1.05
  
  # Significant genes for labeling
  sig_genes <- results %>% 
    filter(Interaction_fdr < 0.05)
  
  # Count genes in each category
  category_counts <- results %>%
    filter(Interaction_fdr < 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::count(category)
  
  n_more_t2d <- sum(results$category == "More reactive in T2D")
  n_less_t2d <- sum(results$category == "Less reactive in T2D")
  
  # Create volcano plot with legend
  p <- ggplot(results, aes(x = Interaction, y = Interaction_pval10, color = color)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    scale_color_identity(
      name = "Gene Category",
      breaks = c("#990000", "#003366", "#D3D3D3"),
      labels = c("More reactive in T2D", "Less reactive in T2D", "Not Significant"),
      guide = "legend"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(cell_name, " - Effect of Glucose Treatment on T2D vs LC"),
      x = "Interaction Term (logFC)",
      y = "-log10(P-Value)"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.margin = margin(b = 10)
    ) +
    xlim(xlim_min, xlim_max) +
    ylim(0, ylim_max) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_text_repel(data = sig_genes, aes(label = Gene),
                    size = 2.5, color = "black", max.overlaps = 20,
                    box.padding = 0.3, segment.alpha = 0.5)
  
  print(p)
  
  cat("Category counts for", cell_name, ":\n")
  print(category_counts)
  cat("\n")
}
dev.off()

```


## c. Perform differential expression between 15 & 30 glucose conc. treatment  in organoid samples (pooled by diabetes group)
### i. Pre-Analysis Steps
```{r}
# Verify dimensions
nrow(so_combined) # genes 7383
ncol(so_combined) # cells 137604

# Check your metadata
table(so_combined$group)
table(so_combined$treatment)
table(so_combined$cell_type_abbrev)
head(so_combined@meta.data[, c("group", "cell_type_abbrev", "record_id", "treatment")])

# Make sure treatment is a factor with 15mM as reference
so_combined$treatment <- factor(so_combined$treatment)
so_combined$treatment <- relevel(so_combined$treatment, ref = "15")  # Adjust to match your actual level name (might be "15mM")

# # Calculate pooled offset if not already done
# if (!"pooled_offset" %in% colnames(so_combined@meta.data)) {
#   so_combined$pooled_offset <- log(so_combined$nCount_RNA + 1)
# }

# Prepare data for cell type distribution plot
celltype_counts <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  group_by(treatment, cell_type_abbrev) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(treatment) %>%
  mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Create stacked barchart
png("/home/hhampson/Results/Barchart_Celltypes_by_Treatment.png", 
    res = 300, width = 2000, height = 2000)
ggplot(celltype_counts, aes(x = treatment, y = proportion, fill = cell_type_abbrev)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution by Glucose Treatment",
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Proportion of Cells",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
dev.off()

# --- Propeller test: T2D vs LC ---
# propeller needs: clusters, sample, group stored in metadata
# Make sure "group" and "record_id" are columns in so_combined metadata
# Option 1: Keep only cell types present in ALL 6 samples
cell_types_in_all <- names(which(colSums(prop_table > 0) == 6))
print(cell_types_in_all)  # Should show 11 cell types

so_filtered <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev %in% cell_types_in_all)

# Now run propeller on filtered data
# Check if propeller.ttest works for paired data
props <- getTransformedProps(
  clusters = so_combined$cell_type_abbrev,
  sample = so_combined$record_id,
  transform = "logit"
)

# Check structure
str(props)
print(props$Samples)

# Create sample info dataframe
sample_info <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, treatment) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(record_id)

print(sample_info)

cat("\n=== Propeller Results: T2D vs Lean Control ===\n")
print(propeller_group)

# Save results
write.csv(propeller_group, "/home/hhampson/Results/Propeller_T2DvsLC_results.csv")

```

### ii. Analysis 
```{r}
# Get cell types to analyze
celltypes <- unique(so_combined$cell_type_abbrev)

# Loop through each cell type
for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  
  cat("\n=== Processing:", cell_name, "===\n")
  
  # Subset to current cell type
  so_celltype <- subset(so_combined, cell_type_abbrev == cell_name)
  DefaultAssay(so_celltype) <- "RNA"
  
  StartGenes <- nrow(so_celltype)
  Cells <- ncol(so_celltype)
  
  cat("Genes:", StartGenes, "| Cells:", Cells, "\n")
  
  # Find highly variable genes
  so_celltype <- FindVariableFeatures(so_celltype, 
                                      selection.method = "vst", 
                                      nfeatures = 2000)
  hvgs <- VariableFeatures(so_celltype)
  
  cat("HVGs:", length(hvgs), "\n")
  
  # Get counts for HVGs
  counts_hvg <- round(GetAssayData(so_celltype, layer = "counts"))
  genes_list <- hvgs  # Changed from hvgs[1] - you want all genes, not just the first!
  
  # Set up parallel processing
  cl <- makeCluster(10)
  registerDoParallel(cl)
  
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  
  # Run NEBULA for each gene in parallel
  nebula_results_list <- foreach(g = genes_list, 
                                 .packages = c("nebula", "Matrix")) %dopar% {
                                   tryCatch({
                                     count_gene <- counts_hvg[g, , drop = FALSE]
                                     meta_gene <- subset(so_celltype, features = g)@meta.data
                                     
                                     # MODEL: comparing treatment (30 vs 15mM)
                                     formula <- as.formula("~ treatment")
                                     pred_gene <- model.matrix(formula, data = meta_gene)
                                     library <- meta_gene$pooled_offset
                                     
                                     # CRITICAL: Sort by record_id to group cells from same subject
                                     sort_order <- order(meta_gene$record_id)
                                     count_gene_sorted <- count_gene[, sort_order, drop = FALSE]
                                     meta_gene_sorted <- meta_gene[sort_order, ]
                                     pred_gene_sorted <- pred_gene[sort_order, , drop = FALSE]
                                     library_sorted <- library[sort_order]
                                     
                                     # Create data structure with sorted data
                                     data_g_gene <- list(count = count_gene_sorted, 
                                                         id = meta_gene_sorted$record_id, 
                                                         pred = pred_gene_sorted, 
                                                         offset = library_sorted)
                                     
                                     # Run NEBULA with offset
                                     result <- nebula(count = data_g_gene$count, 
                                                      id = data_g_gene$id, 
                                                      pred = data_g_gene$pred, 
                                                      ncore = 1, 
                                                      reml = TRUE,
                                                      model = "NBLMM",
                                                      output_re = TRUE,
                                                      covariance = TRUE,
                                                      offset = data_g_gene$offset)
                                     
                                     list(gene = g, result = result)
                                     
                                   }, error = function(e) {
                                     NULL
                                   })
                                 }
  
  stopCluster(cl)
  end_time <- Sys.time()
  cat("Time elapsed:", end_time - start_time, "\n")
  
  # Process results
  nebula_results_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), nebula_results_list)
  names(nebula_results_list) <- sapply(nebula_results_list, function(x) x$gene)
  nebula_results_list <- lapply(nebula_results_list, function(x) x$result)
  
  # Check convergence
  nebula_converged <- map_dfr(
    names(nebula_results_list),
    function(gene_name) {
      converged <- nebula_results_list[[gene_name]]$convergence
      data.frame(Gene = gene_name, Convergence_Code = converged)
    }
  )
  
  # Extract summaries
  nebula_summaries <- map_dfr(
    names(nebula_results_list),
    function(gene_name) {
      df <- nebula_results_list[[gene_name]]$summary
      df <- df %>% mutate(Gene = gene_name)
      return(df)
    }
  )
  
  # Identify non-converged genes
  nonconverge_genes <- unique(
    nebula_converged$Gene[nebula_converged$Convergence_Code %in% c(-40, -50, -60)]
  )
  
  # Format results
  full_results <- as.data.frame(nebula_summaries)
  colnames(full_results) <- c("logFC_Intercept", "logFC", "se_Intercept", 
                              "se", "p_Intercept", "p_value", 
                              "gene_id", "gene", "Gene")
  
  full_results$Variable <- "30vs15mM"
  full_results$Celltype <- cell_name
  
  # Calculate number of genes filtered out for low expression
  full_results$low_exp <- length(genes_list) - nrow(full_results)
  
  # Filter non-converged genes
  full_results <- full_results %>% 
    filter(!gene %in% nonconverge_genes)
  
  # Calculate non-convergence rate
  full_results$nebula_nonconverged_percent <- 
    paste0(round((1 - (length(genes_list) - length(nonconverge_genes)) / 
                    length(genes_list)) * 100, 3), "%")
  
  full_results$Cells <- Cells
  full_results$Genes <- nrow(full_results)
  
  # FDR correction
  full_results$fdr <- p.adjust(full_results$p_value, method = "fdr")
  full_results$PValue10 <- -log10(pmax(full_results$p_value, 1e-10))
  
  # Save results
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  output_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
                           paste0("NEBULA_30vs15mM_", cell_name_clean, 
                                  "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  write.csv(full_results, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Results saved:", output_file, "\n\n")
  
  # # Create volcano plot
  # full_results$color <- ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$logFC > 0, "#990000",
  #                              ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$logFC < 0, "#003366", "gray"))
  # 
  # # Identify significant points (fdr < 0.05)
  # significant_df <- full_results[full_results$fdr < 0.05, ]
  # 
  # Genes <- length(unique(full_results$gene))
  # Cells <- Cells  # Already defined earlier in the loop
  # Nonconvergence_Rate <- unique(full_results$nebula_nonconverged_percent)[1]
  # low_exp <- unique(full_results$low_exp)[1]
  # 
  # # Get min/max for x-axis
  # max_fc <- max(full_results$logFC)
  # min_fc <- min(full_results$logFC)
  # 
  # # Create the volcano plot using ggplot
  # volcano_plot <- ggplot(full_results, aes(x = logFC, y = PValue10, color = color)) +
  #   geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  #   scale_color_identity() +
  #   theme_minimal() +
  #   labs(
  #     title = paste("30 vs. 15mM Glucose Treatment -", cell_name),
  #     subtitle = "Organoids, Unadjusted (REML, Log Normal, Offset)",
  #     x = "Log Fold Change",
  #     y = "-log10(P-Value)",
  #     color = "FC Direction",
  #     caption = paste0("FDR < 0.05, Genes = ", Genes, 
  #                      ", Cells = ", Cells, 
  #                      ", Non-Convergence Rate: ", Nonconvergence_Rate,
  #                      ", Genes Filtered for Low Expression: ", low_exp)
  #   ) +
  #   theme(
  #     plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
  #     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1)
  #   ) +
  #   xlim(-3, 3) +
  #   geom_text(data = significant_df, aes(label = gene),
  #             vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE, color = "black")
  # 
  # # Save volcano plot
  # plot_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
  #                        paste0("Plot_Organoid_NEBULA_", cell_name_clean, 
  #                               "_30vs15mM_unadjusted_2000.png"))
  # png(plot_file, width = 3000, height = 2100, res = 300)
  # print(volcano_plot)
  # dev.off()
  # 
  # cat("Plot saved:", plot_file, "\n\n")
}

cat("\n=== NEBULA Analysis Complete ===\n")



```
### iii. EMM Heatmaps 
```{r}
# Run once interactively to save EMM matrices — not in Quarto
emm_list <- list()

for (ct in unique(nebula_int_all$cell_type)) {
  df_ct     <- nebula_int_all |> dplyr::filter(cell_type == ct)
  top_genes <- df_ct |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[int_fdr_col]])) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(.data[[int_fdr_col]], n = 50) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data[[gene_col]])
  
  if (length(top_genes) < 2) next
  
  ct_orig <- gsub("_", "/", ct)
  so_sub  <- tryCatch(
    subset(so_combined, cell_type_abbrev %in% c(ct, ct_orig)),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(so_sub) || ncol(so_sub) == 0) next
  
  top_genes_present <- intersect(top_genes, rownames(so_sub))
  if (length(top_genes_present) < 2) next
  
  DefaultAssay(so_sub) <- "RNA"
  expr_mat <- as.matrix(
    Seurat::GetAssayData(so_sub, layer = "data")[top_genes_present, , drop = FALSE]
  )
  
  meta <- so_sub@meta.data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      cond = paste0(
        dplyr::case_when(group %in% c("Type 2 Diabetes", "T2D") ~ "T2D", TRUE ~ "LC"),
        "_",
        dplyr::case_when(grepl("30", treatment) ~ "30mM", TRUE ~ "15mM")
      )
    )
  
  emm_mat   <- sapply(unique(meta$cond), function(cc)
    rowMeans(expr_mat[, rownames(meta)[meta$cond == cc], drop = FALSE]))
  col_order <- intersect(c("LC_15mM", "LC_30mM", "T2D_15mM", "T2D_30mM"), colnames(emm_mat))
  emm_mat   <- emm_mat[, col_order, drop = FALSE]
  
  emm_list[[ct]] <- emm_mat
}

# Save locally
saveRDS(emm_list, "/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid_Interaction/nebula_int_emm_list.rds")

```
### iv. Combine Plots
```{r}
#Load in all the celltype results & make a nice figure
# Initialize empty list to store results
all_results <- list()
celltypes <- unique(so_combined$cell_type_abbrev)
for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  input_file <- file.path(paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/NEBULA_30vs15mM_", cell_name_clean, 
                                 "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  # Check if file exists before reading
  if (file.exists(input_file)) {
    file <- read.csv(input_file)
    file$cell_type <- cell_name  # Add cell type column
    all_results[[cell_name]] <- file
    cat("Loaded:", cell_name, "- Genes:", nrow(file), "\n")
  } else {
    cat("File not found:", input_file, "\n")
  }
  
  
  # Combine all results into one dataframe
  combined_results <- bind_rows(all_results)
  
  # Count positive and negative DE genes per cell type
  # Assuming you have logFC and p_adj columns
  de_summary <- combined_results %>%
    filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%  # Adjust column name as needed
    mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "Positive", "Negative")) %>%  # Adjust column name
    group_by(cell_type, direction) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(count = ifelse(direction == "Negative", -count, count))
  
  # Create the plot
  ggplot(de_summary, aes(x = count, y = reorder(cell_type, abs(count)), fill = direction)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Negative" = "#A8C9D9", "Positive" = "#E89A9A")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 11.5, linetype = "dotted", color = "black", size = 0.5) +
    labs(x = "Number of DE genes", 
         y = NULL,
         fill = NULL) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.2, "cm"),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-500,-250, 0, 250,500),
                       labels = c(500,250, 0, 250, 500),
                       limits = c(-800, 800))
  
  # Save the plot
  ggsave("/home/hhampson/Results/DE_genes_by_celltype_barplot_treatment.png", 
         width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# celltypes <- unique(so_combined$cell_type_abbrev)
#Do cell types in order of most to lease degs
celltypes <- c("Neur","Strom","EEC","DPEC","MesV","Prolif","DKE","Mees","DMus","PEC_N","DT","ProlPod","NsKE","MusV")

# Open PDF - one page per cell type
pdf("/home/hhampson/Results/30vs15_Volcano_GSEA_AllCelltypes.pdf", width = 22, height = 10)

for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  input_file <- file.path(paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/NEBULA_30vs15mM_", 
                                 cell_name_clean, "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(input_file)) {
    cat("File not found:", input_file, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  cat("\n=== Processing:", cell_name, "===\n")
  full_results <- read.csv(input_file)
  
  # ---- VOLCANO PLOT ----
  full_results$color <- ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$logFC > 0, "#990000",
                               ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$logFC < 0, "#003366", "gray"))
  
  significant_df <- full_results[full_results$fdr < 0.05, ]
  
  Genes <- length(unique(full_results$gene))
  Nonconvergence_Rate <- unique(full_results$nebula_nonconverged_percent)[1]
  low_exp <- unique(full_results$low_exp)[1]
  n_cells <- unique(full_results$Cells)[1]
  
  # Calculate dynamic x-axis limits
  logFC_range <- range(full_results$logFC, na.rm = TRUE)
  logFC_padding <- diff(logFC_range) * 0.1
  xlim_min <- logFC_range[1] - logFC_padding
  xlim_max <- logFC_range[2] + logFC_padding
  
  volcano_plot <- ggplot(full_results, aes(x = logFC, y = PValue10, color = color)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(cell_name, " - 30 vs 15mM"),
      subtitle = paste0("Genes = ", Genes, " | Cells = ", n_cells, 
                        " | Non-Conv: ", Nonconvergence_Rate),
      x = "Log Fold Change",
      y = "-log10(P-Value)"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10)
    ) +
    xlim(xlim_min, xlim_max) +
    geom_text_repel(data = significant_df, aes(label = gene),
                    size = 2.5, color = "black", max.overlaps = 15,
                    box.padding = 0.3, segment.alpha = 0.5)
  
  # ---- GSEA (Reactome) ----
  rankings <- full_results$logFC
  names(rankings) <- full_results$gene
  rankings <- sort(rankings, decreasing = TRUE)
  
  set.seed(1234)
  reactome_res <- fgsea(pathways = reactome_sets,
                        stats = rankings,
                        scoreType = 'std',
                        minSize = 3,
                        maxSize = 500,
                        nproc = 1,
                        nPermSimple = 10000)
  
  # Prepare GSEA plot data
  gsea_plot_data <- reactome_res %>%
    filter(pval < 0.05) %>%
    arrange(pval) %>%
    head(20) %>%
    mutate(
      direction = ifelse(NES > 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
      pathway_clean = str_remove(pathway, "^REACTOME_"),
      pathway_clean = str_replace_all(pathway_clean, "_", " "),
      pathway_clean = str_to_title(pathway_clean),
      pathway_clean = str_trunc(pathway_clean, 50)
    )
  
  if (nrow(gsea_plot_data) > 0) {
    max_nes <- ceiling(max(abs(gsea_plot_data$NES)) + 0.5)
    
    gsea_plot <- ggplot(gsea_plot_data, aes(x = abs(NES), y = reorder(pathway_clean, abs(NES)),
                                            fill = NES, alpha = abs(NES))) +
      geom_col(width = 0.7) +
      geom_text(aes(x = abs(NES) / 2, label = size),
                color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#1565C0", mid = "white", high = "#C62828", midpoint = 0,
        name = "NES",
        guide = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 8, barheight = 0.5)
      ) +
      scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.5, 1), guide = "none") +
      scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max_nes), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
      labs(
        title = paste0(cell_name, " - Top 20 Reactome (p < 0.05)"),
        x = "NES",
        y = NULL
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top"
      )
    
    # Combine side by side
    combined <- volcano_plot + gsea_plot + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.3))
    print(combined)
    
  } else {
    # No significant GSEA - just print volcano with a note
    gsea_plot <- ggplot() + 
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No significant Reactome\npathways (p < 0.05)",
               size = 6, hjust = 0.5) +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = paste0(cell_name, " - Reactome")) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))
    
    combined <- volcano_plot + gsea_plot + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1.3))
    print(combined)
  }
  
  cat("Printed page for:", cell_name, "\n")
}

dev.off()
cat("\n=== PDF Complete ===\n")

```

## d. Pseudobulk Analysis - Organoid
###1. T2D vs. LC, Adj. for treatment
####i. DESeq2
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Seurat → DESeq2 Pseudobulk Pipeline
# Organoids: T2D vs LC, adjusting for treatment (15mM vs 30mM)
# ============================================================
# ----- 1. Quick checks and set reference levels -----
table(so_combined$group, so_combined$treatment)
table(so_combined$cell_type)

so_combined$group <- factor(so_combined$group, levels = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"))
so_combined$treatment <- factor(so_combined$treatment, levels = c("15", "30"))

# ----- 2. Pseudobulk aggregation (by record_id + treatment) -----
pseudobulk_by_celltype <- function(seurat_obj, cell_type_col = "cell_type") {
  
  counts <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, layer = "counts", assay = "RNA")
  meta <- seurat_obj@meta.data
  
  # Composite sample ID so each participant x treatment is a separate column
  meta$sample_id <- paste(meta$record_id, meta$treatment, sep = "_")
  meta$pb_treatment <- paste(meta[[cell_type_col]], meta$sample_id, sep = "__")
  
  pb_list <- list()
  for (grp in unique(meta$pb_treatment)) {
    cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$pb_treatment == grp]
    if (length(cells) > 1) {
      pb_list[[grp]] <- Matrix::rowSums(counts[, cells])
    } else {
      pb_list[[grp]] <- counts[, cells]
    }
  }
  
  pb_matrix <- do.call(cbind, pb_list)
  colnames(pb_matrix) <- names(pb_list)
  return(pb_matrix)
}

pb_counts <- pseudobulk_by_celltype(so_combined)

# ----- 3. Build sample-level metadata -----
check <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste(record_id, treatment, sep = "_")) %>%
  distinct(sample_id) %>%
  nrow()

so_combined@meta.data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste(record_id, treatment, sep = "_")) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, record_id, group, treatment) %>%
  print(n = 20)


sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste(record_id, treatment, sep = "_")) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, record_id, group, treatment)

sample_meta$group <- factor(sample_meta$group, levels = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"))
sample_meta$treatment <- factor(sample_meta$treatment, levels = c("15", "30"))

rownames(sample_meta) <- NULL
sample_meta <- column_to_rownames(sample_meta, "sample_id")

# Verify
print(sample_meta)

# ----- 4. Run DESeq2 per cell type -----
cell_types <- unique(so_combined$cell_type)
deseq_results <- list()

for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  # Extract columns for this cell type
  ct_cols <- grep(paste0("^", gsub("([.+*?^${}()|\\[\\]])", "\\\\\\1", ct), "__"),
                  colnames(pb_counts), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(ct_cols) < 2) {
    cat("  Skipping — not enough samples\n")
    next
  }
  
  ct_counts <- pb_counts[, ct_cols]
  
  # Extract composite sample IDs from column names
  sample_ids <- gsub(paste0("^", gsub("([.+*?^${}()|\\[\\]])", "\\\\\\1", ct), "__"), 
                     "", colnames(ct_counts))
  colnames(ct_counts) <- sample_ids
  
  # Match metadata
  ct_meta <- sample_meta[sample_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Check we have both groups represented
  if (length(unique(ct_meta$group)) < 2) {
    cat("  Skipping — only one group present\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Filter low-count genes
  min_samples <- ceiling(ncol(ct_counts) * 0.25)
  keep <- rowSums(ct_counts >= 10) >= min_samples
  ct_counts <- ct_counts[keep, ]
  
  cat("  Samples:", ncol(ct_counts), "\n")
  cat("  Genes after filtering:", nrow(ct_counts), "\n")
  
  if (nrow(ct_counts) < 100) {
    cat("  Skipping — too few genes passed filtering\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Create DESeq2 object
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = round(ct_counts),
    colData = ct_meta,
    design = ~ treatment + group
  )
  
  # Run DESeq2
  tryCatch({
    dds <- DESeq(dds)
    
    # Extract results: T2D vs LC
    res <- results(dds, 
                   contrast = c("group", "Type 2 Diabetes", "Lean Control"),
                   alpha = 0.05)
    
    res_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
      rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
      arrange(pvalue) %>%
      mutate(cell_type = ct)
    
    deseq_results[[ct]] <- list(
      dds = dds,
      results = res_df
    )
    
    cat("  Sig genes (padj < 0.05):", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("  Up in T2D:", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05 & res_df$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("  Down in T2D:", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05 & res_df$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ERROR:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# ----- 5. Combine all results -----
all_results <- bind_rows(lapply(deseq_results, function(x) x$results))

# ----- 6. Save -----
write.csv(all_results, "deseq2_organoid_T2DvsLC_all_celltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(deseq_results, "deseq2_organoid_results_list.rds")

# ----- 7. Volcano plots per cell type -----
# ----- 7. Volcano plots per cell type (with top gene labels) -----
library(ggrepel)

for (ct in names(deseq_results)) {
  
  df <- deseq_results[[ct]]$results %>%
    mutate(sig = case_when(
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 0.5 ~ "Up in T2D",
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -0.5 ~ "Down in T2D",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    ))
  
  # Top 10 significant upregulated
  top_up <- df %>%
    filter(sig == "Up in T2D") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  # Top 10 significant downregulated
  top_down <- df %>%
    filter(sig == "Down in T2D") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  top_genes <- bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(pvalue), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_genes,
                    aes(label = gene),
                    size = 2.5,
                    max.overlaps = 20,
                    segment.size = 0.3,
                    segment.alpha = 0.5,
                    show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up in T2D" = "#990000",
                                  "Down in T2D" = "#003366",
                                  "NS" = "grey70")) +
    labs(title = paste("DESeq2:", ct, "— T2D vs LC"),
         subtitle = "Organoids | Adjusted for treatment (15mM/30mM)",
         x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.title = element_blank())
  
  ggsave(paste0("volcano_deseq2_", gsub(" ", "_", ct), ".pdf"),
         p, width = 7, height = 5)
}

```

####ii. Limma
#####DEGs
```{r}
# ── Cell types to loop over ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_types <- unique(so_combined@meta.data$cell_type_abbrev)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_list <- list()
volcano_list <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  message("Processing: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_sub <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev == ct)
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pseudo <- AggregateExpression(
    so_sub,
    assays       = "RNA",
    return.seurat = TRUE,
    group.by     = c("record_id", "cell_type_abbrev")
  )
  
  pb_counts <- GetAssayData(pseudo, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
  
  # skip if too few samples
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sample_ids <- sub(paste0("_", ct, "$"), "", colnames(pb_counts))
  
  sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(record_id, group, treatment)
  
  sample_meta_aligned <- sample_meta[match(sample_ids, sample_meta$record_id), ]
  
  # skip if metadata misaligned
  if (any(is.na(sample_meta_aligned$group))) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — metadata alignment failed")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. Factors with reference levels ──────────────────────────────────────
  group     <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$group),     ref = "Lean Control")
  treatment <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$treatment), ref = "15")
  
  # ── ADD THIS CHECK ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (nlevels(group) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in group: ", paste(levels(group), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  if (nlevels(treatment) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in treatment: ", paste(levels(treatment), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  # ── 5. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = group)
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  # skip if too few genes remain
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 6. Design + voom + fit ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ treatment + group)
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)
  
  # ── 7. Extract results ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # get exact coef name for group
  group_coef <- grep("^group", colnames(fit2$coefficients), value = TRUE)
  
  res <- topTable(fit2, coef = group_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene      = rownames(.),
      cell_type = ct,
      sig       = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Up in T2D",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Down in T2D",
        TRUE                           ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  results_list[[ct]] <- res
  
  # ── 8. Volcano plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  top_genes <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(sig != "NS") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  
  # if no sig genes, label by p-value instead
  if (nrow(top_genes) == 0) {
    top_genes <- res %>%
      dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
  }
  
  n_up   <- sum(res$sig == "Up in T2D")
  n_down <- sum(res$sig == "Down in T2D")
  
  p <- ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    geom_label_repel(
      data         = top_genes,
      aes(label    = gene),
      size         = 2.8,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      show.legend  = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up in T2D"   = "#990000",
        "Down in T2D" = "#003366",
        "NS"          = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    annotate("text", x = Inf,  y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
             label = paste0("Up: ", n_up),   color = "#990000", size = 3.5) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.5,
             label = paste0("Down: ", n_down), color = "#003366", size = 3.5) +
    labs(
      title = ct,
      x     = "log2 Fold Change (T2D vs Lean Control)",
      y     = "-log10(adjusted p-value)",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
  
  volcano_list[[ct]] <- p
  
  # ── 9. Save individual results CSV ────────────────────────────────────────
  write.csv(res, file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_T2DvsLC_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  message("  Done: ", n_up, " up, ", n_down, " down")
}

# ── Combine all results into one dataframe ────────────────────────────────────
results_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
write.csv(results_all, "/home/hhampson/Results/limma_T2DvsLC_allcelltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ── Save volcano plots as PDF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
n_plots  <- length(volcano_list)
n_cols   <- 3
n_rows   <- ceiling(n_plots / n_cols)

pdf("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_volcanos_T2DvsLC.pdf",
    width  = n_cols * 5,
    height = n_rows * 5)

wrap_plots(volcano_list, ncol = n_cols) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Limma-voom: T2D vs Lean Control by Cell Type",
    subtitle = "adj.P.Val < 0.05, |logFC| > 1",
    theme    = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))
  )

dev.off()

message("All done! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/")
```
#####GSEA
```{r}
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)

# ── Reactome gene sets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_results_list <- list()

# ── Loop over cell types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in names(results_list)) {
  
  message("GSEA: ", ct)
  
  res <- results_list[[ct]]
  
  # ── 1. Build ranked gene list (moderated t-statistic) ─────────────────────
  ranks <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))
  
  gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
  
  # deduplicate (keep highest |t|)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
  
  if (length(gene_ranks) < 50) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few ranked genes")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 2. Run fgsea ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  set.seed(42)
  gsea_res <- fgsea(
    pathways   = reactome_pathways,
    stats      = gene_ranks,
    minSize    = 15,
    maxSize    = 500,
    nPermSimple = 10000
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)
  
  gsea_results_list[[ct]] <- gsea_res
  
  # ── 3. Save per-cell-type CSV ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  gsea_out <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  
  write.csv(gsea_out,
            file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/gsea_reactome_T2DvsLC_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # ── 4. Top pathway bar plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  top_paths <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  
  # if fewer than 5 significant, show top 20 by pval regardless
  if (nrow(top_paths) < 5) {
    top_paths <- gsea_res %>%
      dplyr::arrange(pval) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  }
  
  if (nrow(top_paths) > 0) {
    
    top_paths <- top_paths %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        pathway_short = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
        pathway_short = gsub("_", " ", pathway_short),
        pathway_short = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_short),
        pathway_short = stringr::str_trunc(pathway_short, 60),
        direction     = ifelse(NES > 0, "Up in T2D", "Down in T2D")
      )
    
    cat("\n\n## GSEA: ", ct, " {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
    
    p_gsea <- ggplot(top_paths, aes(x = reorder(pathway_short, NES), y = NES, fill = direction)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.7) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up in T2D" = "#990000", "Down in T2D" = "#003366")) +
      labs(
        title = paste0("Reactome GSEA — ", ct),
        x     = NULL,
        y     = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
        fill  = NULL
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#003366")
      )
    
    print(p_gsea)
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  message("  Done: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
}

# ── Combine all GSEA results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_results_list) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))

write.csv(gsea_all,
          file = "/home/hhampson/Results/gsea_reactome_T2DvsLC_allcelltypes.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

message("GSEA complete! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/")

```

###2. T2D vs. LC, Effect Modification with Treatment (Interaction)
```{r}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Organoid Interaction Model: Group × Treatment
# Limma-voom pseudobulk with EMMs, GSEA, and heatmap-ready output
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(stringr)

# ── Output directory ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
out_dir      <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid_Interaction"
gsea_dir     <- file.path(out_dir, "GSEA")
emm_dir      <- file.path(out_dir, "EMM")
heatmap_dir  <- file.path(out_dir, "Heatmap_Data")

dir.create(out_dir,     showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(gsea_dir,    showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(emm_dir,     showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(heatmap_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ── Reactome gene sets ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Cell types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_types <- unique(so_combined@meta.data$cell_type_abbrev)

# ── Storage ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_interaction <- list()
emm_list            <- list()
gsea_interaction    <- list()
heatmap_data_list   <- list()

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Main loop
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
for (ct in cell_types) {

  message("\n═══ Processing: ", ct, " ═══")
  ct_safe <- gsub("[/ ]", "_", ct)

  # ── 1. Subset & pseudobulk ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_sub <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev == ct)

  pseudo <- AggregateExpression(
    so_sub,
    assays        = "RNA",
    return.seurat = TRUE,
    group.by      = c("record_id", "treatment")
  )

  pb_counts <- GetAssayData(pseudo, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")

  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }

  # ── 2. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sample_ids_raw <- colnames(pb_counts)

  sample_info <- data.frame(
    pb_sample = sample_ids_raw,
    record_id = sub("_([^_]+)$", "", sample_ids_raw),
    treatment = sub("^.*_", "", sample_ids_raw),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data |>
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::select(record_id, group)

  sample_info <- sample_info |>
    dplyr::left_join(sample_meta, by = "record_id")

  if (any(is.na(sample_info$group))) {
    message("  Skipping — metadata alignment failed")
    next
  }

  grp <- relevel(factor(sample_info$group),     ref = "Lean Control")
  trt <- relevel(factor(sample_info$treatment), ref = "15")

  if (nlevels(grp) < 2 || nlevels(trt) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping — insufficient factor levels")
    next
  }

  # ── 3. TMM normalization + filtering ───────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = interaction(grp, trt))
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]

  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }

  # ── 4. Design + voom + fit ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ grp * trt)

  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)

  coef_names <- colnames(fit2$coefficients)
  n_coefs    <- ncol(fit2$coefficients)
  message("  Coefficients (", n_coefs, "): ", paste(coef_names, collapse = ", "))

  # ── 5. Interaction term DEGs ───────────────────────────────────────────
  int_coef <- grep(":", coef_names, value = TRUE)

  if (length(int_coef) != 1 || all(is.na(fit2$coefficients[, int_coef]))) {
    message("  Interaction term not estimable — skipping DEGs/GSEA")
    next
  }

  res_int <- topTable(fit2, coef = int_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene      = rownames(topTable(fit2, coef = int_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")),
      cell_type = ct,
      sig       = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Sig Positive",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Sig Negative",
        TRUE                           ~ "NS"
      )
    )

  results_interaction[[ct]] <- res_int

  write.csv(res_int,
            file.path(out_dir, paste0("limma_interaction_", ct_safe, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)

  n_sig <- sum(res_int$sig != "NS", na.rm = TRUE)
  message("  Interaction DEGs: ", n_sig, " significant")

  # ── 6. GSEA on interaction term ────────────────────────────────────────
  ranks <- res_int |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))

  gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]

  if (length(gene_ranks) >= 50) {
    set.seed(42)
    gsea_res <- fgsea(
      pathways    = reactome_pathways,
      stats       = gene_ranks,
      minSize     = 15,
      maxSize     = 500,
      nPermSimple = 10000
    ) |>
      dplyr::arrange(padj) |>
      dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)

    gsea_interaction[[ct]] <- gsea_res

    gsea_out <- gsea_res |>
      dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))

    write.csv(gsea_out,
              file.path(gsea_dir, paste0("gsea_reactome_interaction_", ct_safe, ".csv")),
              row.names = FALSE)

    message("  GSEA: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
  } else {
    message("  GSEA: too few ranked genes (", length(gene_ranks), ")")
  }

  # ── 7. Estimated Marginal Means ────────────────────────────────────────
  if (n_coefs != 4) {
    message("  Skipping EMMs — only ", n_coefs, " estimable coefficients")
    next
  }

  # Contrast vectors for each group×treatment combination
  # Design: ~ grp * trt  →  (Intercept), grpT2D, trt30, grpT2D:trt30
  contrast_emm <- rbind(
    "LC_15mM"  = c(1, 0, 0, 0),
    "T2D_15mM" = c(1, 1, 0, 0),
    "LC_30mM"  = c(1, 0, 1, 0),
    "T2D_30mM" = c(1, 1, 1, 1)
  )

  emm_vals <- fit2$coefficients %*% t(contrast_emm)

  emm_df <- data.frame(gene = rownames(fit2$coefficients), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  for (g in rownames(contrast_emm)) {
    cvec <- contrast_emm[g, ]
    cfit <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrasts = cvec)
    cfit <- eBayes(cfit)

    emm_df[[paste0(g, "_EMM")]] <- emm_vals[, g]
    emm_df[[paste0(g, "_SE")]]  <- sqrt(cfit$s2.post) * cfit$stdev.unscaled[, 1]
  }

  emm_df$cell_type <- ct
  emm_list[[ct]] <- emm_df

  write.csv(emm_df,
            file.path(emm_dir, paste0("emm_interaction_", ct_safe, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)

  # ── 8. Heatmap data: top 20 positive + top 20 negative by interaction logFC
  top_pos <- res_int |>
    dplyr::filter(logFC > 0) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(P.Value, n = 20)

  top_neg <- res_int |>
    dplyr::filter(logFC < 0) |>
    dplyr::slice_min(P.Value, n = 20)

  top_genes <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_pos, top_neg)$gene

  if (length(top_genes) > 0) {
    hm_mat <- emm_df |>
      dplyr::filter(gene %in% top_genes) |>
      dplyr::select(gene, ends_with("_EMM")) |>
      tibble::column_to_rownames("gene")

    colnames(hm_mat) <- gsub("_EMM$", "", colnames(hm_mat))

    heatmap_data_list[[ct]] <- hm_mat

    write.csv(hm_mat,
              file.path(heatmap_dir, paste0("heatmap_emm_", ct_safe, ".csv")),
              row.names = TRUE)

    message("  Heatmap: ", nrow(hm_mat), " genes (", sum(top_pos$gene %in% rownames(hm_mat)),
            " pos + ", sum(top_neg$gene %in% rownames(hm_mat)), " neg)")
  }

  message("  ✓ Done")
}

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Combine & save all results
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
if (length(results_interaction) > 0) {
  interaction_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_interaction)
  write.csv(interaction_all,
            file.path(out_dir, "limma_interaction_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

if (length(emm_list) > 0) {
  emm_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(emm_list)
  write.csv(emm_all,
            file.path(emm_dir, "emm_interaction_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

if (length(gsea_interaction) > 0) {
  gsea_int_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_interaction) |>
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  write.csv(gsea_int_all,
            file.path(gsea_dir, "gsea_reactome_interaction_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

# ── Cell counts for Quarto ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_counts_interaction <- so_combined@meta.data |>
  dplyr::count(cell_type_abbrev, group, treatment) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(group, treatment),
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(cell_type_abbrev)

write.csv(cell_counts_interaction,
          file.path(out_dir, "cell_counts_per_celltype_interaction.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

message("\n✅ Interaction analysis complete!")
message("Results saved to: ", out_dir)
message("  ├── limma_interaction_*.csv        (DEG tables)")
message("  ├── GSEA/gsea_reactome_*.csv       (pathway enrichment)")
message("  ├── EMM/emm_interaction_*.csv      (estimated marginal means)")
message("  └── Heatmap_Data/heatmap_emm_*.csv (heatmap matrices)")



```

#Check cell types first 
```{r}
# ── Cell counts per cell type × group × treatment ─────────────────────────────
cell_counts_table <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::count(cell_type_abbrev, group, treatment) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(group, treatment),
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(cell_type_abbrev)

# print full table
print(cell_counts_table, n = Inf)

# ── Also show unique sample (record_id) counts per combination ────────────────
sample_counts_table <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::distinct(record_id, cell_type_abbrev, group, treatment) %>%
  dplyr::count(cell_type_abbrev, group, treatment) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = c(group, treatment),
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(cell_type_abbrev)

# this is the critical one — shows how many pseudobulk samples per group
print(sample_counts_table, n = Inf)

# ── Save both ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write.csv(cell_counts_table,
          "/home/hhampson/Results/cell_counts_by_celltype_group_treatment.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(sample_counts_table,
          "/home/hhampson/Results/sample_counts_by_celltype_group_treatment.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```


###2. Interaction Model — Group x Treatment
#####DEGs + EMMs + GSEA
```{r}
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(stringr)

# ── Reactome gene sets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Cell types to loop over ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_types <- unique(so_combined@meta.data$cell_type_abbrev)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_interaction <- list()
emm_list            <- list()
gsea_interaction    <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  message("Processing interaction: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_sub <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev == ct)
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pseudo <- AggregateExpression(
    so_sub,
    assays        = "RNA",
    return.seurat = TRUE,
    group.by      = c("record_id", "treatment")
  )
  
  pb_counts <- GetAssayData(pseudo, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
  
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sample_ids_raw <- colnames(pb_counts)
  
  sample_info <- data.frame(
    pb_sample = sample_ids_raw,
    record_id = sub("_([^_]+)$", "", sample_ids_raw),
    treatment = sub("^.*_", "", sample_ids_raw),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(record_id, group)
  
  sample_info <- sample_info %>%
    dplyr::left_join(sample_meta, by = "record_id")
  
  if (any(is.na(sample_info$group))) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — metadata alignment failed")
    next
  }
  
  grp <- relevel(factor(sample_info$group),     ref = "Lean Control")
  trt <- relevel(factor(sample_info$treatment), ref = "15")
  
  if (nlevels(grp) < 2 || nlevels(trt) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — insufficient factor levels")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = interaction(grp, trt))
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 5. Design with interaction + voom + fit ───────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ grp * trt)
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)
  
  coef_names <- colnames(fit2$coefficients)
  n_coefs    <- ncol(fit2$coefficients)
  message("  Coefficients (", n_coefs, "): ", paste(coef_names, collapse = ", "))
  
  # ── 6. Interaction term ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  int_coef <- grep(":", coef_names, value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(int_coef) == 1 && !all(is.na(fit2$coefficients[, int_coef]))) {
    res_int <- topTable(fit2, coef = int_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        gene      = rownames(.),
        cell_type = ct,
        sig       = dplyr::case_when(
          adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Sig Positive",
          adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Sig Negative",
          TRUE                           ~ "NS"
        )
      )
    results_interaction[[ct]] <- res_int
    
    write.csv(res_int,
              file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_Interaction_", ct, ".csv"),
              row.names = FALSE)
    
    # ── GSEA on interaction term ────────────────────────────────────────────
    ranks <- res_int %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))
    
    gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
    gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
    
    if (length(gene_ranks) >= 50) {
      set.seed(42)
      gsea_res <- fgsea(
        pathways    = reactome_pathways,
        stats       = gene_ranks,
        minSize     = 15,
        maxSize     = 500,
        nPermSimple = 10000
      ) %>%
        dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)
      
      gsea_interaction[[ct]] <- gsea_res
      
      gsea_out <- gsea_res %>%
        dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
      write.csv(gsea_out,
                file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/gsea_reactome_Interaction_", ct, ".csv"),
                row.names = FALSE)
      
      message("    GSEA: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
    }
    
  } else {
    message("  Interaction term not estimable for ", ct, " — skipping")
  }
  
  # ── 7. Estimated Marginal Means ───────────────────────────────────────────
  if (n_coefs != 4) {
    message("  Skipping EMMs for ", ct, " — only ", n_coefs, " estimable coefficients")
  } else {
    contrast_emm <- rbind(
      "LC_15mM"  = c(1, 0, 0, 0),
      "LC_30mM"  = c(1, 0, 1, 0),
      "T2D_15mM" = c(1, 1, 0, 0),
      "T2D_30mM" = c(1, 1, 1, 1)
    )
    
    emm_vals <- fit2$coefficients %*% t(contrast_emm)
    
    emm_df <- data.frame(gene = rownames(fit2$coefficients), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    
    for (g in rownames(contrast_emm)) {
      cvec <- contrast_emm[g, ]
      cfit <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrasts = cvec)
      cfit <- eBayes(cfit)
      
      emm_df[[paste0(g, "_EMM")]] <- emm_vals[, g]
      emm_df[[paste0(g, "_SE")]]  <- sqrt(cfit$s2.post) * cfit$stdev.unscaled[, 1]
    }
    
    emm_df$cell_type <- ct
    emm_list[[ct]] <- emm_df
    
    write.csv(emm_df,
              file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_InteractionModel_EMM_", ct, ".csv"),
              row.names = FALSE)
  }
  
  # ── Summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (ct %in% names(results_interaction)) {
    n_int <- sum(results_interaction[[ct]]$sig != "NS", na.rm = TRUE)
    message("  Done: ", n_int, " interaction DEGs")
  } else {
    message("  Done (no interaction term)")
  }
}

# ── Combine all results ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (length(results_interaction) > 0) {
  interaction_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_interaction)
  write.csv(interaction_all,
            "/home/hhampson/Results/limma_Interaction_allcelltypes.csv",
            row.names = FALSE)
}

if (length(emm_list) > 0) {
  emm_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(emm_list)
  write.csv(emm_all,
            "/home/hhampson/Results/limma_InteractionModel_EMM_allcelltypes.csv",
            row.names = FALSE)
}

if (length(gsea_interaction) > 0) {
  gsea_int_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_interaction) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  write.csv(gsea_int_all,
            "/home/hhampson/Results/gsea_reactome_Interaction_allcelltypes.csv",
            row.names = FALSE)
}

message("Interaction analysis complete! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Seurat → DESeq2 Pseudobulk Pipeline
# Organoids: Interaction between group (T2D/LC) and treatment (30mM/15mM)
# ============================================================
# ----- 1. Quick checks and set reference levels -----
table(so_combined$group, so_combined$treatment)
table(so_combined$cell_type)

so_combined$group <- factor(so_combined$group, levels = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"))
so_combined$treatment <- factor(so_combined$treatment, levels = c("15", "30"))

# ----- 2. Pseudobulk aggregation (by record_id + treatment) -----
pseudobulk_by_celltype <- function(seurat_obj, cell_type_col = "cell_type") {
  
  counts <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, layer = "counts", assay = "RNA")
  meta <- seurat_obj@meta.data
  
  meta$sample_id <- paste(meta$record_id, meta$treatment, sep = "_")
  meta$pb_treatment <- paste(meta[[cell_type_col]], meta$sample_id, sep = "__")
  
  pb_list <- list()
  for (grp in unique(meta$pb_treatment)) {
    cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$pb_treatment == grp]
    if (length(cells) > 1) {
      pb_list[[grp]] <- Matrix::rowSums(counts[, cells])
    } else {
      pb_list[[grp]] <- counts[, cells]
    }
  }
  
  pb_matrix <- do.call(cbind, pb_list)
  colnames(pb_matrix) <- names(pb_list)
  return(pb_matrix)
}

pb_counts <- pseudobulk_by_celltype(so_combined)

# ----- 3. Build sample-level metadata -----
sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste(record_id, treatment, sep = "_")) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, record_id, group, treatment)

sample_meta$group <- factor(sample_meta$group, levels = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"))
sample_meta$treatment <- factor(sample_meta$treatment, levels = c("15", "30"))

rownames(sample_meta) <- NULL
sample_meta <- column_to_rownames(sample_meta, "sample_id")

print(sample_meta)

# ----- 4. Run DESeq2 per cell type -----
cell_types <- unique(so_combined$cell_type)
deseq_results_int <- list()

for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("Processing:", ct, "\n")
  cat("========================================\n")
  
  ct_cols <- grep(paste0("^", gsub("([.+*?^${}()|\\[\\]])", "\\\\\\1", ct), "__"),
                  colnames(pb_counts), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(ct_cols) < 2) {
    cat("  Skipping — not enough samples\n")
    next
  }
  
  ct_counts <- pb_counts[, ct_cols]
  
  sample_ids <- gsub(paste0("^", gsub("([.+*?^${}()|\\[\\]])", "\\\\\\1", ct), "__"), 
                     "", colnames(ct_counts))
  colnames(ct_counts) <- sample_ids
  
  ct_meta <- sample_meta[sample_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Need both groups AND both treatments
  if (length(unique(ct_meta$group)) < 2 | length(unique(ct_meta$treatment)) < 2) {
    cat("  Skipping — need both groups and both treatments for interaction\n")
    next
  }
  
  min_samples <- ceiling(ncol(ct_counts) * 0.25)
  keep <- rowSums(ct_counts >= 10) >= min_samples
  ct_counts <- ct_counts[keep, ]
  
  cat("  Samples:", ncol(ct_counts), "\n")
  cat("  Genes after filtering:", nrow(ct_counts), "\n")
  
  if (nrow(ct_counts) < 100) {
    cat("  Skipping — too few genes passed filtering\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Design with interaction term
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = round(ct_counts),
    colData = ct_meta,
    design = ~ group + treatment + group:treatment
  )
  
  tryCatch({
    dds <- DESeq(dds)
    
    # Check what coefficients are available
    cat("  Coefficients:", resultsNames(dds), "\n")
    
    # Extract the interaction term
    # This is: (T2D 30mM vs T2D 15mM) - (LC 30mM vs LC 15mM)
    # i.e., does the treatment effect differ between T2D and LC?
    res <- results(dds, 
                   name = "groupType.2.Diabetes.treatment30",
                   alpha = 0.05)
    
    res_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
      rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
      arrange(pvalue) %>%
      mutate(cell_type = ct)
    
    deseq_results_int[[ct]] <- list(
      dds = dds,
      results = res_df
    )
    
    cat("  Sig genes (padj < 0.05):", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("  Positive interaction:", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05 & res_df$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("  Negative interaction:", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05 & res_df$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ERROR:", e$message, "\n")
    # If the auto-generated name doesn't match, try to find it
    cat("  Available names:", resultsNames(dds), "\n")
  })
}

# ----- 5. Combine all results -----
all_results_int <- bind_rows(lapply(deseq_results_int, function(x) x$results))

# ----- 6. Save -----
write.csv(all_results_int, "deseq2_organoid_interaction_all_celltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(deseq_results_int, "deseq2_organoid_interaction_results_list.rds")

# ----- 7. Volcano plots — interaction term only -----
library(ggrepel)

for (ct in names(deseq_results_int)) {
  
  df <- deseq_results_int[[ct]]$results %>%
    mutate(sig = case_when(
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 0.5 ~ "T2D responds more to 30mM",
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -0.5 ~ "LC responds more to 30mM",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    ))
  
  top_up <- df %>%
    filter(sig == "T2D responds more to 30mM") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  top_down <- df %>%
    filter(sig == "LC responds more to 30mM") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  top_genes <- bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(pvalue), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_genes,
                    aes(label = gene),
                    size = 2.5,
                    max.overlaps = 20,
                    segment.size = 0.3,
                    segment.alpha = 0.5,
                    show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("T2D responds more to 30mM" = "#990000",
                                  "LC responds more to 30mM" = "#003366",
                                  "NS" = "grey70")) +
    labs(title = paste("DESeq2 Interaction:", ct),
         subtitle = "Group × Treatment | (T2D 30→15) vs (LC 30→15)",
         x = "log2 Fold Change (Interaction)", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.title = element_blank())
  
  ggsave(paste0("volcano_deseq2_interaction_", gsub(" ", "_", ct), ".pdf"),
         p, width = 7, height = 5)
}
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

# ── Cell types to loop over ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_types <- unique(so_combined@meta.data$cell_type_abbrev)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_list <- list()
emm_list     <- list()
volcano_list <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  message("Processing: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_sub <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev == ct)
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pseudo <- AggregateExpression(
    so_sub,
    assays        = "RNA",
    return.seurat = TRUE,
    group.by      = c("record_id", "cell_type_abbrev")
  )
  
  pb_counts <- GetAssayData(pseudo, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
  
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sample_ids <- sub(paste0("_", ct, "$"), "", colnames(pb_counts))
  
  sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(record_id, group, treatment)
  
  sample_meta_aligned <- sample_meta[match(sample_ids, sample_meta$record_id), ]
  
  if (any(is.na(sample_meta_aligned$group))) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — metadata alignment failed")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. Factors with reference levels ──────────────────────────────────────
  group     <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$group),     ref = "Lean Control")
  treatment <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$treatment), ref = "15")
  
  if (nlevels(group) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in group: ", paste(levels(group), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  if (nlevels(treatment) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in treatment: ", paste(levels(treatment), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # ── 5. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = group)
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 6. Interaction design + voom + fit ────────────────────────────────────
  # ~ 0 + group:treatment gives one coefficient per group×treatment combination
  # making EMM extraction straightforward
  design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group:treatment)
  
  # clean up colnames: "groupLean Control:treatment15" → "LC_15" etc.
  # colnames(design) <- colnames(design) %>%
  #   gsub("group", "", .) %>%
  #   gsub("treatment", "", .) %>%
  #   gsub("Lean Control:", "LC_", .) %>%
  #   gsub("Type 2 Diabetes:", "T2D_", .) %>%
  #   gsub(" ", "", .)
  
  # check all columns have variance (drop zero-variance columns)
  design <- design[, colSums(design) > 0, drop = FALSE]
  
  if (ncol(design) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — not enough design columns after cleaning")
    next
  }
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  
  # ── 7. Contrasts: interaction term = (T2D_30 - T2D_15) - (LC_30 - LC_15) ──
  # First check which group×treatment combos exist in this cell type
  available_cols <- colnames(design)
  message("  Design columns: ", paste(available_cols, collapse = ", "))
  
  # Build contrast only if all 4 groups present
  if (all(c("LC_15", "LC_30", "T2D_15", "T2D_30") %in% available_cols)) {
    
    contrast_mat <- makeContrasts(
      # Main effect: T2D vs LC at baseline (15mM)
      T2D_vs_LC_baseline  = T2D_15 - LC_15,
      # Main effect: T2D vs LC at high glucose (30mM)
      T2D_vs_LC_highgluc  = T2D_30 - LC_30,
      # Interaction: does the T2D vs LC difference change with glucose treatment?
      Interaction         = (T2D_30 - T2D_15) - (LC_30 - LC_15),
      levels = design
    )
    
  } else {
    # Fall back to whatever groups are available
    message("  Warning: not all 4 group×treatment combos present, fitting available contrast")
    # build a simple T2D vs LC contrast from whatever is available
    t2d_col <- grep("T2D", available_cols, value = TRUE)[1]
    lc_col  <- grep("LC",  available_cols, value = TRUE)[1]
    contrast_expr <- setNames(c(1, -1), c(t2d_col, lc_col))
    contrast_mat  <- makeContrasts(contrasts = paste0(t2d_col, " - ", lc_col), levels = design)
  }
  
  fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_mat)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)
  
  # ── 8. Extract DE results for each contrast ────────────────────────────────
  contrast_names <- colnames(contrast_mat)
  
  for (cname in contrast_names) {
    res <- topTable(fit2, coef = cname, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        gene      = rownames(.),
        cell_type = ct,
        contrast  = cname,
        sig       = dplyr::case_when(
          adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Up in T2D",
          adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Down in T2D",
          TRUE                           ~ "NS"
        )
      )
    results_list[[paste0(ct, "_", cname)]] <- res
    
    write.csv(res,
              file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_interaction_", ct, "_", cname, ".csv"),
              row.names = FALSE)
  }
  
  # ── 9. Estimated marginal means per group×treatment ────────────────────────
  # EMMs = fitted values from the ~ 0 + group:treatment model
  # = the model-estimated mean log-CPM for each group×treatment cell
  # fit$coefficients columns ARE the EMMs directly (because ~ 0 + full factorial)
  
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(t(fit$coefficients)) %>%   # genes as columns, groups as rows
    tibble::rownames_to_column("condition") %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-condition, names_to = "gene", values_to = "emm_logcpm") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      cell_type = ct,
      group     = dplyr::case_when(
        grepl("T2D", condition) ~ "Type 2 Diabetes",
        grepl("LC",  condition) ~ "Lean Control"
      ),
      treatment = dplyr::case_when(
        grepl("_30", condition) ~ "30",
        grepl("_15", condition) ~ "15"
      )
    )
  
  emm_list[[ct]] <- emm_df
  
  write.csv(emm_df,
```
