```{r}
            file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_EMM_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # ── 10. Volcano plot for interaction term ──────────────────────────────────
  res_interaction <- results_list[[paste0(ct, "_Interaction")]]
  
  if (!is.null(res_interaction)) {
    
    top_genes <- res_interaction %>%
      dplyr::filter(sig != "NS") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
    
    if (nrow(top_genes) == 0) {
      top_genes <- res_interaction %>%
        dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
    }
    
    n_up   <- sum(res_interaction$sig == "Up in T2D")
    n_down <- sum(res_interaction$sig == "Down in T2D")
    
    p <- ggplot(res_interaction, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = sig)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
      geom_label_repel(
        data         = top_genes,
        aes(label    = gene),
        size         = 2.8,
        max.overlaps = 20,
        show.legend  = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = c(
          "Up in T2D"   = "#990000",
          "Down in T2D" = "#003366",
          "NS"          = "grey70"
        )
      ) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
      annotate("text", x =  Inf, y = Inf, hjust =  1.1, vjust = 1.5,
               label = paste0("Up: ",   n_up),   color = "#990000", size = 3.5) +
      annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.5,
               label = paste0("Down: ", n_down), color = "#003366", size = 3.5) +
      labs(
        title    = ct,
        subtitle = "Interaction: (T2D_30 - T2D_15) - (LC_30 - LC_15)",
        x        = "log2 Fold Change",
        y        = "-log10(adjusted p-value)",
        color    = NULL
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold")
      )
    
    volcano_list[[ct]] <- p
  }
  
  message("  Done: ", ct)
}

# ── Combine & save all results ────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
write.csv(results_all, "/home/hhampson/Results/limma_interaction_allcelltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

emm_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(emm_list)
write.csv(emm_all, "/home/hhampson/Results/limma_EMM_allcelltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ── Save volcano PDFs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
n_plots <- length(volcano_list)
n_cols  <- 3
n_rows  <- ceiling(n_plots / n_cols)

pdf("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_interaction_volcanos.pdf",
    width  = n_cols * 5,
    height = n_rows * 5)

wrap_plots(volcano_list, ncol = n_cols) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Limma-voom Interaction: (T2D_30 - T2D_15) - (LC_30 - LC_15)",
    subtitle = "adj.P.Val < 0.05, |logFC| > 1",
    theme    = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))
  )

dev.off()

message("All done! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/")
```

###3. Treatment, Adj. for group - Limma
#### DEGS
```{r}
# ── Cell types to loop over ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_types <- unique(so_combined@meta.data$cell_type_abbrev)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_list <- list()
volcano_list <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  message("Processing: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_sub <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev == ct)
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pseudo <- AggregateExpression(
    so_sub,
    assays       = "RNA",
    return.seurat = TRUE,
    group.by     = c("record_id", "cell_type_abbrev")
  )
  
  pb_counts <- GetAssayData(pseudo, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
  
  # skip if too few samples
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sample_ids <- sub(paste0("_", ct, "$"), "", colnames(pb_counts))
  
  sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(record_id, group, treatment)
  
  sample_meta_aligned <- sample_meta[match(sample_ids, sample_meta$record_id), ]
  
  # skip if metadata misaligned
  if (any(is.na(sample_meta_aligned$treatment))) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — metadata alignment failed")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. Factors with reference levels ──────────────────────────────────────
  group     <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$group),     ref = "Lean Control")
  treatment <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$treatment), ref = "15")
  
  # ── ADD THIS CHECK ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (nlevels(group) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in group: ", paste(levels(group), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  if (nlevels(treatment) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in treatment: ", paste(levels(treatment), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # ── 5. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = treatment)
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  # skip if too few genes remain
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 6. Design + voom + fit ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ group + treatment)
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)
  
  # ── 7. Extract results ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # get exact coef name for treatment
  treatment_coef <- grep("^treatment", colnames(fit2$coefficients), value = TRUE)
  
  res <- topTable(fit2, coef = treatment_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene      = rownames(.),
      cell_type = ct,
      sig       = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Up in 30mM",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Down in 30mM",
        TRUE                           ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  results_list[[ct]] <- res
  
  # ── 8. Volcano plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  top_genes <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(sig != "NS") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  
  # if no sig genes, label by p-value instead
  if (nrow(top_genes) == 0) {
    top_genes <- res %>%
      dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
  }
  
  n_up   <- sum(res$sig == "Up in 30mM")
  n_down <- sum(res$sig == "Down in 30mM")
  
  p <- ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    geom_label_repel(
      data         = top_genes,
      aes(label    = gene),
      size         = 2.8,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      show.legend  = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up in 30mM"   = "#990000",
        "Down in 30mM" = "#003366",
        "NS"           = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    annotate("text", x = Inf,  y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
             label = paste0("Up: ", n_up),   color = "#990000", size = 3.5) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.5,
             label = paste0("Down: ", n_down), color = "#003366", size = 3.5) +
    labs(
      title = ct,
      x     = "log2 Fold Change (30mM vs 15mM)",
      y     = "-log10(adjusted p-value)",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
  
  volcano_list[[ct]] <- p
  
  # ── 9. Save individual results CSV ────────────────────────────────────────
  write.csv(res, file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/limma_treatment_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  message("  Done: ", n_up, " up, ", n_down, " down")
}

# ── Combine all results into one dataframe ────────────────────────────────────
results_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
write.csv(results_all, "/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/limma_treatment_allcelltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ── Save volcano plots as PDF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
n_plots  <- length(volcano_list)
n_cols   <- 3
n_rows   <- ceiling(n_plots / n_cols)

pdf("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/limma_volcanos_treatment.pdf",
    width  = n_cols * 5,
    height = n_rows * 5)

wrap_plots(volcano_list, ncol = n_cols) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Limma-voom: 30mM vs 15mM by Cell Type",
    subtitle = "adj.P.Val < 0.05, |logFC| > 1",
    theme    = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))
  )

dev.off()

message("All done! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/")
```
#### GSEA
```{r}
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)

# ── Reactome gene sets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_results_list <- list()

# ── Loop over cell types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in names(results_list)) {
  
  message("GSEA: ", ct)
  
  res <- results_list[[ct]]
  
  # ── 1. Build ranked gene list (moderated t-statistic) ─────────────────────
  ranks <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))
  
  gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
  
  # deduplicate (keep highest |t|)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
  
  if (length(gene_ranks) < 50) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few ranked genes")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 2. Run fgsea ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  set.seed(42)
  gsea_res <- fgsea(
    pathways   = reactome_pathways,
    stats      = gene_ranks,
    minSize    = 15,
    maxSize    = 500,
    nPermSimple = 10000
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)
  
  gsea_results_list[[ct]] <- gsea_res
  
  # ── 3. Save per-cell-type CSV ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  gsea_out <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  
  write.csv(gsea_out,
            file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/gsea_reactome_treatment_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # ── 4. Top pathway bar plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  top_paths <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  
  # if fewer than 5 significant, show top 20 by pval regardless
  if (nrow(top_paths) < 5) {
    top_paths <- gsea_res %>%
      dplyr::arrange(pval) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  }
  
  if (nrow(top_paths) > 0) {
    
    top_paths <- top_paths %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        pathway_short = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
        pathway_short = gsub("_", " ", pathway_short),
        pathway_short = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_short),
        pathway_short = stringr::str_trunc(pathway_short, 60),
        direction     = ifelse(NES > 0, "Up in 30mM", "Down in 30mM")
      )
    
    cat("\n\n## GSEA: ", ct, " {.scrollable}\n\n", sep = "")
    
    p_gsea <- ggplot(top_paths, aes(x = reorder(pathway_short, NES), y = NES, fill = direction)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.7) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up in 30mM" = "#990000", "Down in 30mM" = "#003366")) +
      labs(
        title = paste0("Reactome GSEA — ", ct),
        x     = NULL,
        y     = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
        fill  = NULL
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#003366")
      )
    
    print(p_gsea)
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  message("  Done: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
}

# ── Combine all GSEA results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_results_list) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))

write.csv(gsea_all,
          file = "/home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/gsea_reactome_treatment_allcelltypes.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

message("GSEA complete! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/Organoid Limma Treatment/")
```


```{r}
###2. 30mM vs. 15mM, Adj. for group
# ============================================================
# Seurat → DESeq2 Pseudobulk Pipeline
# Organoids: 30mM vs 15mM, adjusting for group (T2D vs LC)
# ============================================================
# ----- 1. Quick checks and set reference levels -----
table(so_combined$group, so_combined$treatment)
table(so_combined$cell_type)

so_combined$group <- factor(so_combined$group, levels = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"))
so_combined$treatment <- factor(so_combined$treatment, levels = c("15", "30"))

# ----- 2. Pseudobulk aggregation (by record_id + treatment) -----
pseudobulk_by_celltype <- function(seurat_obj, cell_type_col = "cell_type") {
  
  counts <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, layer = "counts", assay = "RNA")
  meta <- seurat_obj@meta.data
  
  meta$sample_id <- paste(meta$record_id, meta$treatment, sep = "_")
  meta$pb_treatment <- paste(meta[[cell_type_col]], meta$sample_id, sep = "__")
  
  pb_list <- list()
  for (grp in unique(meta$pb_treatment)) {
    cells <- rownames(meta)[meta$pb_treatment == grp]
    if (length(cells) > 1) {
      pb_list[[grp]] <- Matrix::rowSums(counts[, cells])
    } else {
      pb_list[[grp]] <- counts[, cells]
    }
  }
  
  pb_matrix <- do.call(cbind, pb_list)
  colnames(pb_matrix) <- names(pb_list)
  return(pb_matrix)
}

pb_counts <- pseudobulk_by_celltype(so_combined)

# ----- 3. Build sample-level metadata -----
sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste(record_id, treatment, sep = "_")) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, record_id, group, treatment)

sample_meta$group <- factor(sample_meta$group, levels = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"))
sample_meta$treatment <- factor(sample_meta$treatment, levels = c("15", "30"))

rownames(sample_meta) <- NULL
sample_meta <- column_to_rownames(sample_meta, "sample_id")

print(sample_meta)

# ----- 4. Run DESeq2 per cell type -----
cell_types <- unique(so_combined$cell_type)
deseq_results_trt <- list()

for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  ct_cols <- grep(paste0("^", gsub("([.+*?^${}()|\\[\\]])", "\\\\\\1", ct), "__"),
                  colnames(pb_counts), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(ct_cols) < 2) {
    cat("  Skipping — not enough samples\n")
    next
  }
  
  ct_counts <- pb_counts[, ct_cols]
  
  sample_ids <- gsub(paste0("^", gsub("([.+*?^${}()|\\[\\]])", "\\\\\\1", ct), "__"), 
                     "", colnames(ct_counts))
  colnames(ct_counts) <- sample_ids
  
  ct_meta <- sample_meta[sample_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (length(unique(ct_meta$treatment)) < 2) {
    cat("  Skipping — only one treatment present\n")
    next
  }
  
  min_samples <- ceiling(ncol(ct_counts) * 0.25)
  keep <- rowSums(ct_counts >= 10) >= min_samples
  ct_counts <- ct_counts[keep, ]
  
  cat("  Samples:", ncol(ct_counts), "\n")
  cat("  Genes after filtering:", nrow(ct_counts), "\n")
  
  if (nrow(ct_counts) < 100) {
    cat("  Skipping — too few genes passed filtering\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Design: adjust for group, test treatment
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = round(ct_counts),
    colData = ct_meta,
    design = ~ group + treatment
  )
  
  tryCatch({
    dds <- DESeq(dds)
    
    # Extract results: 30mM vs 15mM
    res <- results(dds, 
                   contrast = c("treatment", "30", "15"),
                   alpha = 0.05)
    
    res_df <- as.data.frame(res) %>%
      rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
      arrange(pvalue) %>%
      mutate(cell_type = ct)
    
    deseq_results_trt[[ct]] <- list(
      dds = dds,
      results = res_df
    )
    
    cat("  Sig genes (padj < 0.05):", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("  Up in 30mM:", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05 & res_df$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("  Down in 30mM:", sum(res_df$padj < 0.05 & res_df$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ERROR:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# ----- 5. Combine all results -----
all_results_trt <- bind_rows(lapply(deseq_results_trt, function(x) x$results))

# ----- 6. Save -----
write.csv(all_results_trt, "deseq2_organoid_30vs15_all_celltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ----- 7. Volcano plots per cell type -----
for (ct in names(deseq_results_trt)) {
  
  df <- deseq_results_trt[[ct]]$results %>%
    mutate(sig = case_when(
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 0.5 ~ "Up in 30mM",
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -0.5 ~ "Down in 30mM",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    ))
  
  top_up <- df %>%
    filter(sig == "Up in 30mM") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  top_down <- df %>%
    filter(sig == "Down in 30mM") %>%
    arrange(padj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  top_genes <- bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(pvalue), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_genes,
                    aes(label = gene),
                    size = 2.5,
                    max.overlaps = 20,
                    segment.size = 0.3,
                    segment.alpha = 0.5,
                    show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up in 30mM" = "#990000",
                                  "Down in 30mM" = "#003366",
                                  "NS" = "grey70")) +
    labs(title = paste("DESeq2:", ct, "— 30mM vs 15mM"),
         subtitle = "Organoids | Adjusted for group (T2D/LC)",
         x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.title = element_blank())
  
  ggsave(paste0("volcano_deseq2_trt_", gsub(" ", "_", ct), ".pdf"),
         p, width = 7, height = 5)
}
```
####ii. Limma — Treatment Effect (30mM vs 15mM)
#####DEGs
```{r}
# ── Cell types to loop over ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cell_types <- unique(so_combined@meta.data$cell_type_abbrev)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_list_trt <- list()
volcano_list_trt <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in cell_types) {
  
  message("Processing: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_sub <- subset(so_combined, subset = cell_type_abbrev == ct)
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pseudo <- AggregateExpression(
    so_sub,
    assays        = "RNA",
    return.seurat = TRUE,
    group.by      = c("record_id", "cell_type_abbrev")
  )
  
  pb_counts <- GetAssayData(pseudo, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts")
  
  # skip if too few samples
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  sample_ids <- sub(paste0("_", ct, "$"), "", colnames(pb_counts))
  
  sample_meta <- so_combined@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(record_id, group, treatment)
  
  sample_meta_aligned <- sample_meta[match(sample_ids, sample_meta$record_id), ]
  
  # skip if metadata misaligned
  if (any(is.na(sample_meta_aligned$group))) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — metadata alignment failed")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. Factors with reference levels ──────────────────────────────────────
  group     <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$group),     ref = "Lean Control")
  treatment <- relevel(factor(sample_meta_aligned$treatment), ref = "15")
  
  # ── Check for 2 levels in each factor ─────────────────────────────────────
  if (nlevels(group) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in group: ", paste(levels(group), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  if (nlevels(treatment) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in treatment: ", paste(levels(treatment), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # ── 5. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = treatment)
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  # skip if too few genes remain
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 6. Design + voom + fit ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ group + treatment)
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)
  
  # ── 7. Extract results for treatment coefficient ──────────────────────────
  trt_coef <- grep("^treatment", colnames(fit2$coefficients), value = TRUE)
  
  res <- topTable(fit2, coef = trt_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene      = rownames(.),
      cell_type = ct,
      sig       = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Up in 30mM",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Down in 30mM",
        TRUE                           ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  results_list_trt[[ct]] <- res
  
  # ── 8. Volcano plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  top_up <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(sig == "Up in 30mM") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
  
  top_down <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(sig == "Down in 30mM") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
  
  top_genes <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  
  # if no sig genes, label by p-value instead
  if (nrow(top_genes) == 0) {
    top_genes <- res %>%
      dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
  }
  
  n_up   <- sum(res$sig == "Up in 30mM")
  n_down <- sum(res$sig == "Down in 30mM")
  n_genes <- format(nrow(res), big.mark = ",")
  
  p <- ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    geom_label_repel(
      data         = top_genes,
      aes(label    = gene),
      size         = 2.8,
      max.overlaps = 25,
      show.legend  = FALSE,
      box.padding  = 0.4,
      point.padding = 0.3,
      force        = 2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up in 30mM"   = "#9b2226",
        "Down in 30mM" = "#005f73",
        "NS"           = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = ct,
      subtitle = paste0(n_genes, " genes tested"),
      x        = "log2 Fold Change (30mM vs 15mM)",
      y        = "-log10(adjusted p-value)",
      color    = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 8, color = "#555")
    )
  
  volcano_list_trt[[ct]] <- p
  
  # ── 9. Save individual results CSV ────────────────────────────────────────
  write.csv(res, file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_TreatmentEffect_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  message("  Done: ", n_up, " up, ", n_down, " down")
}

# ── Combine all results into one dataframe ────────────────────────────────────
results_all_trt <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list_trt)
write.csv(results_all_trt, "/home/hhampson/Results/limma_TreatmentEffect_allcelltypes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ── Save volcano plots as PDF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
n_plots  <- length(volcano_list_trt)
n_cols   <- 3
n_rows   <- ceiling(n_plots / n_cols)

pdf("/home/hhampson/Results/limma_volcanos_TreatmentEffect.pdf",
    width  = n_cols * 5,
    height = n_rows * 5)

wrap_plots(volcano_list_trt, ncol = n_cols) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Limma-voom: Treatment Effect (30mM vs 15mM) by Cell Type",
    subtitle = "adj.P.Val < 0.05, |logFC| > 1  |  Adjusted for T2D/LC group",
    theme    = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))
  )

dev.off()

message("All done! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/")
```

#####GSEA
```{r}
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)

# ── Reactome gene sets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_results_list_trt <- list()

# ── Loop over cell types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in names(results_list_trt)) {
  
  message("GSEA: ", ct)
  
  res <- results_list_trt[[ct]]
  
  # ── 1. Build ranked gene list (moderated t-statistic) ─────────────────────
  ranks <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))
  
  gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
  
  # deduplicate (keep highest |t|)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
  
  if (length(gene_ranks) < 50) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few ranked genes")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 2. Run fgsea ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  set.seed(42)
  gsea_res <- fgsea(
    pathways    = reactome_pathways,
    stats       = gene_ranks,
    minSize     = 15,
    maxSize     = 500,
    nPermSimple = 10000
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)
  
  gsea_results_list_trt[[ct]] <- gsea_res
  
  # ── 3. Save per-cell-type CSV ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  gsea_out <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  
  write.csv(gsea_out,
            file = paste0("/home/hhampson/Results/gsea_reactome_TreatmentEffect_", ct, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # ── 4. Top pathway bar plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  sig_paths <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::filter(padj < 0.05)
  
  if (nrow(sig_paths) < 3) {
    sig_paths <- gsea_res %>%
      dplyr::arrange(pval) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 20)
  } else {
    top_up <- sig_paths %>%
      dplyr::filter(NES > 0) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
    
    top_down <- sig_paths %>%
      dplyr::filter(NES < 0) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)
    
    sig_paths <- dplyr::bind_rows(top_up, top_down)
  }
  
  if (nrow(sig_paths) > 0) {
    
    sig_paths <- sig_paths %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        pathway_short = gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathway),
        pathway_short = gsub("_", " ", pathway_short),
        pathway_short = stringr::str_to_title(pathway_short),
        pathway_short = stringr::str_trunc(pathway_short, 60),
        direction     = ifelse(NES > 0, "Up in 30mM", "Down in 30mM")
      )
    
    p_gsea <- ggplot(sig_paths, aes(x = reorder(pathway_short, NES), y = NES, fill = direction)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.7) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up in 30mM" = "#9b2226", "Down in 30mM" = "#005f73")) +
      labs(
        title = paste0("Reactome GSEA — ", ct),
        x     = NULL,
        y     = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
        fill  = NULL
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#001219")
      )
    
    print(p_gsea)
  }
  
  message("  Done: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
}

# ── Combine all GSEA results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
gsea_all_trt <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_results_list_trt) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))

write.csv(gsea_all_trt,
          file = "/home/hhampson/Results/gsea_reactome_TreatmentEffect_allcelltypes.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

message("GSEA complete! Results saved to /home/hhampson/Results/")
```


#4. Biopsy Analysis
## a. Visualize
```{r}
#Start by clustering
unique(so_kpmp_sc$record_id) #"RH-50-T" "RH-62-T" "CRC-03"  "CRC-11"  "CRC-10"  "RH-72-T"

# PCA
so_kpmp_sc <- NormalizeData(so_kpmp_sc)
so_kpmp_sc <- ScaleData(so_kpmp_sc, features = VariableFeatures(so_kpmp_sc))
so_kpmp_sc <- FindVariableFeatures(object = so_kpmp_sc)
so_kpmp_sc <- RunPCA(so_kpmp_sc, features = VariableFeatures(object = so_kpmp_sc),assay="RNA")
ElbowPlot(so_kpmp_sc)

# # Find neighbors and clusters 
so_kpmp_sc <- FindNeighbors(so_kpmp_sc, assay = "RNA", dims = 1:20) #20 based on elbow plot
so_kpmp_sc <- FindClusters(so_kpmp_sc, resolution = 0.5)

# Perform UMAP
so_kpmp_sc <- RunUMAP(so_kpmp_sc, dims = 1:30) #25 to 50 dimensions for organoid, start with 30
so_kpmp_sc@reductions
DimPlot(so_kpmp_sc, reduction = "umap", raster = F)
Idents(so_kpmp_sc) <- "seurat_clusters"  # or whatever the column is named

# Verify you have 25 clusters
print(paste("Number of clusters:", length(unique(Idents(so_kpmp_sc)))))
print(table(Idents(so_kpmp_sc)))  # Show distribution of cells per cluster
DimPlot(so_kpmp_sc, reduction = "umap", raster = T)

DimPlot(so_kpmp_sc, reduction = "umap", raster = T, group.by = "record_id")

Idents(so_kpmp_sc) <- "celltype_LR"
unique(so_kpmp_sc$celltype_LR)
plot <- DimPlot(so_kpmp_sc, reduction = "umap", raster = T, label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, label.size = 6)

ggsave("/home/hhampson/Results/UMAP_celltype_biopsy.png", plot, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)


#Full Biopsy Data
#Load kidney scRNAseq PB90
gc()
bucket <- "scrna" # bucket name in Kopah
temp_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".rds") # need to create a temporary file
s3$download_file(bucket, "Kidney organoids/cleaned_biopsy_full.rds", temp_file)
so_biopsy <- readRDS(temp_file)

# PCA
so_biopsy <- NormalizeData(so_biopsy)
so_biopsy <- ScaleData(so_biopsy, features = VariableFeatures(so_biopsy))
so_biopsy <- FindVariableFeatures(object = so_biopsy)
so_biopsy <- RunPCA(so_biopsy, features = VariableFeatures(object = so_biopsy),assay="RNA")
ElbowPlot(so_biopsy)

# # Find neighbors and clusters 
so_biopsy <- FindNeighbors(so_biopsy, assay = "RNA", dims = 1:20) #20 based on elbow plot
so_biopsy <- FindClusters(so_biopsy, resolution = 0.5)

# Perform UMAP
so_biopsy <- RunUMAP(so_biopsy, dims = 1:30) #25 to 50 dimensions for organoid, start with 30
so_biopsy@reductions
DimPlot(so_biopsy, reduction = "umap", raster = F)
Idents(so_biopsy) <- "celltype_LR"  # or whatever the column is named

# Verify you have 25 clusters
print(paste("Number of clusters:", length(unique(Idents(so_biopsy)))))
print(table(Idents(so_biopsy)))  # Show distribution of cells per cluster
DimPlot(so_biopsy, reduction = "umap", raster = T)

DimPlot(so_biopsy, reduction = "umap", raster = T, group.by = "record_id")

Idents(so_biopsy) <- "celltype_LR"
unique(so_biopsy$celltype_LR)
plot <- DimPlot(so_biopsy, reduction = "umap", raster = T, label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, label.size = 6)

# ggsave("/home/hhampson/Results/UMAP_celltype_biopsy_full.png", plot, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)

```

## b. Perform differential expression between T2D & LC in Biopsy samples
### i. Pre-Analysis Steps
```{r}
# Verify dimensions
nrow(so_kpmp_sc) # genes
ncol(so_kpmp_sc) # cells

# Check your metadata
table(so_kpmp_sc$group)
table(so_kpmp_sc$celltype_LR)
head(so_kpmp_sc@meta.data[, c("group", "celltype_LR", "kit_id")])

# Make sure group is a factor with LC as reference
so_kpmp_sc$group <- factor(so_kpmp_sc$group)
so_kpmp_sc$group <- relevel(so_kpmp_sc$group, ref = "Lean_Control")  # Adjust to match your actual level name

# Prepare data for cell type distribution plot
celltype_counts <- so_kpmp_sc@meta.data %>%
  group_by(group, celltype_LR) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Create stacked barchart
png("/home/hhampson/Results/Barchart_Celltypes_by_Group_Biopsy.png", 
    res = 300, width = 2000, height = 2000)
ggplot(celltype_counts, aes(x = group, y = proportion, fill = celltype_LR)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Cell Type Distribution by Diabetes Status",
    x = "Group",
    y = "Proportion of Cells",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
dev.off()

```

### ii. Analysis 
```{r}
# Get cell types to analyze
celltypes <- unique(so_kpmp_sc$celltype_LR)[-15] #Remove nonspecific because non in Lean controls & not enough cells

#Tal ran already, do remaining celltypes
celltypes <- unique(so_kpmp_sc$celltype_LR)[-c(1,15)]

# Loop through each cell type
for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  
  cat("\n=== Processing:", cell_name, "===\n")
  
  # Subset to current cell type
  so_celltype <- subset(so_kpmp_sc, celltype_LR == cell_name)
  DefaultAssay(so_celltype) <- "RNA"
  
  StartGenes <- nrow(so_celltype)
  Cells <- ncol(so_celltype)
  
  cat("Genes:", StartGenes, "| Cells:", Cells, "\n")
  
  # CHECK: Skip if cell type doesn't have both groups
  group_table <- table(so_celltype$group)
  if (length(group_table) < 2) {
    cat("Skipping - only has", names(group_table), "group level\n\n")
    next
  }
  cat("Group distribution:", paste(names(group_table), "=", group_table, collapse=", "), "\n")
  
  # Also check kit_id distribution
  kit_table <- table(so_celltype$kit_id)
  if (length(kit_table) < 2) {
    cat("Skipping - only has 1 sample\n\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Make sure group is a factor with correct reference level
  so_celltype$group <- factor(so_celltype$group)
  so_celltype$group <- relevel(so_celltype$group, ref = "Lean_Control")
  
  # Find highly variable genes
  so_celltype <- FindVariableFeatures(so_celltype, 
                                      selection.method = "vst", 
                                      nfeatures = 2000)
  hvgs <- VariableFeatures(so_celltype)
  
  cat("HVGs:", length(hvgs), "\n")
  
  # Get counts for HVGs
  counts_hvg <- round(GetAssayData(so_celltype, layer = "counts"))
  genes_list <- hvgs  
  
  # Set up parallel processing
  cl <- makeCluster(10)
  registerDoParallel(cl)
  
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  
  # Run NEBULA for each gene in parallel
  nebula_results_list <- foreach(g = genes_list, 
                                 .packages = c("nebula", "Matrix")) %dopar% {
                                   tryCatch({
                                     count_gene <- counts_hvg[g, , drop = FALSE]
                                     meta_gene <- subset(so_celltype, features = g)@meta.data
                                     pred_gene <- model.matrix(~group, data = meta_gene)
                                     library <- meta_gene$pooled_offset
                                     
                                     # Use group_cell to properly structure data (handles sorting automatically)
                                     data_g_gene <- group_cell(count = count_gene, 
                                                               id = meta_gene$kit_id, 
                                                               pred = pred_gene, 
                                                               offset = library)
                                     
                                     # If group_cell returns NULL, create data structure manually
                                     if (is.null(data_g_gene)) {
                                       data_g_gene <- list(count = count_gene, 
                                                           id = meta_gene$kit_id, 
                                                           pred = pred_gene, 
                                                           offset = library)
                                     }
                                     
                                     # Run NEBULA with offset
                                     result <- nebula(count = data_g_gene$count, 
                                                      id = data_g_gene$id, 
                                                      pred = data_g_gene$pred, 
                                                      ncore = 1, 
                                                      reml = TRUE,
                                                      model = "NBLMM",
                                                      output_re = TRUE,
                                                      covariance = TRUE,
                                                      offset = data_g_gene$offset)
                                     
                                     list(gene = g, result = result)
                                     
                                   }, error = function(e) {
                                     NULL
                                   })
                                 }
  
  stopCluster(cl)
  end_time <- Sys.time()
  cat("Time elapsed:", end_time - start_time, "\n")
  
  # Process results
  nebula_results_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), nebula_results_list)
  names(nebula_results_list) <- sapply(nebula_results_list, function(x) x$gene)
  nebula_results_list <- lapply(nebula_results_list, function(x) x$result)
  
  # Check convergence
  nebula_converged <- map_dfr(
    names(nebula_results_list),
    function(gene_name) {
      converged <- nebula_results_list[[gene_name]]$convergence
      data.frame(Gene = gene_name, Convergence_Code = converged)
    }
  )
  
  # Extract summaries
  nebula_summaries <- map_dfr(
    names(nebula_results_list),
    function(gene_name) {
      df <- nebula_results_list[[gene_name]]$summary
      df <- df %>% mutate(Gene = gene_name)
      return(df)
    }
  )
  
  # Identify non-converged genes
  nonconverge_genes <- unique(
    nebula_converged$Gene[nebula_converged$Convergence_Code == -40]
  )
  
  # Format results
  full_results <- as.data.frame(nebula_summaries)
  
  # Calculate number of genes filtered out for low expression
  low_exp <- length(genes_list) - nrow(full_results)
  
  # Filter non-converged genes
  full_results <- full_results %>% 
    filter(!gene %in% nonconverge_genes)
  
  # Calculate non-convergence rate
  nebula_nonconverged_percent <- 
    paste0(round((1 - (length(genes_list) - length(nonconverge_genes)) / 
                    length(genes_list)) * 100, 3), "%")
  
  # FDR correction
  full_results <- full_results %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(`p_groupType_2_Diabetes`, method = "fdr"))
  
  full_results$PValue10 <- -log10(pmax(full_results$`p_groupType_2_Diabetes`, 1e-10))
  
  # Add metadata columns
  full_results$Variable <- "T2DvsLC"
  full_results$Celltype <- cell_name
  full_results$low_exp <- low_exp
  full_results$nebula_nonconverged_percent <- nebula_nonconverged_percent
  full_results$Cells <- Cells
  full_results$Genes <- nrow(full_results)
  
  # Save results
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  output_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
                           paste0("NEBULA_Biopsy_T2DvsLC_", cell_name_clean, 
                                  "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  write.csv(full_results, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Results saved:", output_file, "\n\n")
  
  # # Create volcano plot
  # full_results$color <- ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$`logFC_groupType_2_Diabetes` > 0, "#990000",
  #                              ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$`logFC_groupType_2_Diabetes` < 0, "#003366", "gray"))
  # 
  # # Identify significant points (fdr < 0.05)
  # significant_df <- full_results[full_results$fdr < 0.05, ]
  # 
  # Genes <- length(unique(full_results$gene))
  # Nonconvergence_Rate <- nebula_nonconverged_percent
  # 
  # # Create the volcano plot using ggplot
  # volcano_plot <- ggplot(full_results, aes(x = `logFC_groupType_2_Diabetes`, y = PValue10, color = color)) +
  #   geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  #   scale_color_identity() +
  #   theme_minimal() +
  #   labs(
  #     title = paste("Type 2 Diabetes vs. Lean Controls -", cell_name),
  #     subtitle = "Biopsy, Unadjusted (REML, Log Normal, Offset)",
  #     x = "Log Fold Change",
  #     y = "-log10(P-Value)",
  #     color = "FC Direction",
  #     caption = paste0("FDR < 0.05, Genes = ", Genes, 
  #                      ", Cells = ", Cells, 
  #                      ", Non-Convergence Rate: ", Nonconvergence_Rate,
  #                      ", Genes Filtered for Low Expression: ", low_exp)
  #   ) +
  #   theme(
  #     plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
  #     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1)
  #   ) +
  #   xlim(-3, 3) +
  #   geom_text(data = significant_df, aes(label = gene),
  #             vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE, color = "black")
  # 
  # # Save volcano plot
  # plot_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
  #                        paste0("Plot_Biopsy_NEBULA_", cell_name_clean, 
  #                               "_T2DvsLC_unadjusted_2000.png"))
  # png(plot_file, width = 3000, height = 2100, res = 300)
  # print(volcano_plot)
  # dev.off()
  
  # cat("Plot saved:", plot_file, "\n\n")
}
```

### iii. Full Biopsy Set
```{r}
# Verify dimensions
nrow(so_biopsy) # genes
ncol(so_biopsy) # cells

# Check your metadata
table(so_biopsy$group)
table(so_biopsy$celltype_LR)
head(so_biopsy@meta.data[, c("group", "celltype_LR", "kit_id")])

# Make sure group is a factor with LC as reference
so_biopsy$group <- factor(so_biopsy$group)
so_biopsy$group <- relevel(so_biopsy$group, ref = "Lean_Control")  # Adjust to match your actual level name


# Get cell types to analyze
celltypes <- unique(so_biopsy$celltype_LR) #Remove nonspecific because non in Lean controls & not enough cells

# Loop through each cell type
for (cell_name in celltypes) {
  
  cat("\n=== Processing:", cell_name, "===\n")
  
  # Subset to current cell type
  so_celltype <- subset(so_biopsy, celltype_LR == cell_name)
  DefaultAssay(so_celltype) <- "RNA"
  
  StartGenes <- nrow(so_celltype)
  Cells <- ncol(so_celltype)
  
  cat("Genes:", StartGenes, "| Cells:", Cells, "\n")
  
  # CHECK: Skip if cell type doesn't have both groups
  group_table <- table(so_celltype$group)
  if (length(group_table) < 2) {
    cat("Skipping - only has", names(group_table), "group level\n\n")
    next
  }
  cat("Group distribution:", paste(names(group_table), "=", group_table, collapse=", "), "\n")
  
  # Also check kit_id distribution
  kit_table <- table(so_celltype$kit_id)
  if (length(kit_table) < 2) {
    cat("Skipping - only has 1 sample\n\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Make sure group is a factor with correct reference level
  so_celltype$group <- factor(so_celltype$group)
  so_celltype$group <- relevel(so_celltype$group, ref = "Lean_Control")
  
  # Find highly variable genes
  so_celltype <- FindVariableFeatures(so_celltype, 
                                      selection.method = "vst", 
                                      nfeatures = 2000)
  hvgs <- VariableFeatures(so_celltype)
  
  cat("HVGs:", length(hvgs), "\n")
  
  # Get counts for HVGs
  counts_hvg <- round(GetAssayData(so_celltype, layer = "counts"))
  genes_list <- hvgs  
  
  # Set up parallel processing
  cl <- makeCluster(10)
  registerDoParallel(cl)
  
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  
  # Run NEBULA for each gene in parallel
  nebula_results_list <- foreach(g = genes_list, 
                                 .packages = c("nebula", "Matrix")) %dopar% {
                                   tryCatch({
                                     count_gene <- counts_hvg[g, , drop = FALSE]
                                     meta_gene <- subset(so_celltype, features = g)@meta.data
                                     pred_gene <- model.matrix(~group, data = meta_gene)
                                     library <- meta_gene$pooled_offset
                                     
                                     # Use group_cell to properly structure data (handles sorting automatically)
                                     data_g_gene <- group_cell(count = count_gene, 
                                                               id = meta_gene$kit_id, 
                                                               pred = pred_gene, 
                                                               offset = library)
                                     
                                     # If group_cell returns NULL, create data structure manually
                                     if (is.null(data_g_gene)) {
                                       data_g_gene <- list(count = count_gene, 
                                                           id = meta_gene$kit_id, 
                                                           pred = pred_gene, 
                                                           offset = library)
                                     }
                                     
                                     # Run NEBULA with offset
                                     result <- nebula(count = data_g_gene$count, 
                                                      id = data_g_gene$id, 
                                                      pred = data_g_gene$pred, 
                                                      ncore = 1, 
                                                      reml = TRUE,
                                                      model = "NBLMM",
                                                      output_re = TRUE,
                                                      covariance = TRUE,
                                                      offset = data_g_gene$offset)
                                     
                                     list(gene = g, result = result)
                                     
                                   }, error = function(e) {
                                     NULL
                                   })
                                 }
  
  stopCluster(cl)
  end_time <- Sys.time()
  cat("Time elapsed:", end_time - start_time, "\n")
  
  # Process results
  nebula_results_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), nebula_results_list)
  names(nebula_results_list) <- sapply(nebula_results_list, function(x) x$gene)
  nebula_results_list <- lapply(nebula_results_list, function(x) x$result)
  
  # Check convergence
  nebula_converged <- map_dfr(
    names(nebula_results_list),
    function(gene_name) {
      converged <- nebula_results_list[[gene_name]]$convergence
      data.frame(Gene = gene_name, Convergence_Code = converged)
    }
  )
  
  # Extract summaries
  nebula_summaries <- map_dfr(
    names(nebula_results_list),
    function(gene_name) {
      df <- nebula_results_list[[gene_name]]$summary
      df <- df %>% mutate(Gene = gene_name)
      return(df)
    }
  )
  
  # Identify non-converged genes
  nonconverge_genes <- unique(
    nebula_converged$Gene[nebula_converged$Convergence_Code == -40]
  )
  
  # Format results
  full_results <- as.data.frame(nebula_summaries)
  
  # Calculate number of genes filtered out for low expression
  low_exp <- length(genes_list) - nrow(full_results)
  
  # Filter non-converged genes
  full_results <- full_results %>% 
    filter(!gene %in% nonconverge_genes)
  
  # Calculate non-convergence rate
  nebula_nonconverged_percent <- 
    paste0(round((1 - (length(genes_list) - length(nonconverge_genes)) / 
                    length(genes_list)) * 100, 3), "%")
  
  # FDR correction
  full_results <- full_results %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(`p_groupType_2_Diabetes`, method = "fdr"))
  
  full_results$PValue10 <- -log10(pmax(full_results$`p_groupType_2_Diabetes`, 1e-10))
  
  # Add metadata columns
  full_results$Variable <- "T2DvsLC"
  full_results$Celltype <- cell_name
  full_results$low_exp <- low_exp
  full_results$nebula_nonconverged_percent <- nebula_nonconverged_percent
  full_results$Cells <- Cells
  full_results$Genes <- nrow(full_results)
  
  # Save results
  cell_name_clean <- str_replace_all(cell_name, "[/ -]", "_")
  output_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
                           paste0("NEBULA_Biopsy_Full_T2DvsLC_", cell_name_clean, 
                                  "_unadjusted_2000.csv"))
  write.csv(full_results, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Results saved:", output_file, "\n\n")
  
  # # Create volcano plot
  # full_results$color <- ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$`logFC_groupType_2_Diabetes` > 0, "#990000",
  #                              ifelse(full_results$fdr < 0.05 & full_results$`logFC_groupType_2_Diabetes` < 0, "#003366", "gray"))
  # 
  # # Identify significant points (fdr < 0.05)
  # significant_df <- full_results[full_results$fdr < 0.05, ]
  # 
  # Genes <- length(unique(full_results$gene))
  # Nonconvergence_Rate <- nebula_nonconverged_percent
  # 
  # # Create the volcano plot using ggplot
  # volcano_plot <- ggplot(full_results, aes(x = `logFC_groupType_2_Diabetes`, y = PValue10, color = color)) +
  #   geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  #   scale_color_identity() +
  #   theme_minimal() +
  #   labs(
  #     title = paste("Type 2 Diabetes vs. Lean Controls -", cell_name),
  #     subtitle = "Biopsy, Unadjusted (REML, Log Normal, Offset)",
  #     x = "Log Fold Change",
  #     y = "-log10(P-Value)",
  #     color = "FC Direction",
  #     caption = paste0("FDR < 0.05, Genes = ", Genes, 
  #                      ", Cells = ", Cells, 
  #                      ", Non-Convergence Rate: ", Nonconvergence_Rate,
  #                      ", Genes Filtered for Low Expression: ", low_exp)
  #   ) +
  #   theme(
  #     plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
  #     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1)
  #   ) +
  #   xlim(-3, 3) +
  #   geom_text(data = significant_df, aes(label = gene),
  #             vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE, color = "black")
  # 
  # # Save volcano plot
  # plot_file <- file.path("/home/hhampson/Results", 
  #                        paste0("Plot_Biopsy_NEBULA_", cell_name_clean, 
  #                               "_T2DvsLC_unadjusted_2000.png"))
  # png(plot_file, width = 3000, height = 2100, res = 300)
  # print(volcano_plot)
  # dev.off()
  
  # cat("Plot saved:", plot_file, "\n\n")
}
```

###iv. Pseudobulk
####Biopsy: Limma-voom Pseudobulk — T2D vs LC
#####DEGs + GSEA
######Sub-Sample - T2D & LC Oragnoid Match
```{r}

# ── Paths ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir_results_biopsy <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC"
dir_gsea_biopsy    <- file.path(dir_results_biopsy, "GSEA")
dir.create(dir_results_biopsy, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(dir_gsea_biopsy, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Reactome gene sets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Cell types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
celltypes <- unique(so_kpmp_sc$celltype_LR)[-15]

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_list_biopsy <- list()
gsea_list_biopsy    <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in celltypes) {
  
  message("Processing biopsy: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_ct <- subset(so_kpmp_sc, celltype_LR == ct)
  DefaultAssay(so_ct) <- "RNA"
  
  # check both groups present
  group_table <- table(so_ct$group)
  if (length(group_table) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only has: ", paste(names(group_table), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # check at least 2 samples per group
  sample_group <- so_ct@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(kit_id, group)
  samples_per_group <- table(sample_group$group)
  
  if (any(samples_per_group < 2)) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — need >=2 samples per group. Have: ",
            paste(names(samples_per_group), "=", samples_per_group, collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pb_counts <- AggregateExpression(
    so_ct,
    assays       = "RNA",
    return.seurat = FALSE,
    group.by     = "kit_id"
  )$RNA
  
  pb_counts <- round(as.matrix(pb_counts))
  
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  col_data <- so_ct@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(kit_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(kit_id, group) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  rownames(col_data) <- col_data$kit_id
  
  # match column order
  pb_counts <- pb_counts[, rownames(col_data)]
  
  grp <- relevel(factor(col_data$group), ref = "Lean_Control")
  
  if (nlevels(grp) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in group")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = grp)
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 5. Design + voom + fit ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ grp)
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)
  
  # ── 6. Extract results ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  grp_coef <- grep("grp", colnames(fit2$coefficients), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(grp_coef) != 1) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — unexpected coefficients: ",
            paste(colnames(fit2$coefficients), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  res <- topTable(fit2, coef = grp_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene      = rownames(.),
      cell_type = ct,
      sig       = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Up in T2D",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Down in T2D",
        TRUE                           ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  results_list_biopsy[[ct]] <- res
  
  ct_clean <- str_replace_all(ct,"/","_")
  ct_clean <- str_replace_all(ct_clean,"-","_")
  write.csv(res,
            file = file.path(dir_results_biopsy, paste0("limma_biopsy_T2DvsLC_", ct_clean, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  n_up   <- sum(res$sig == "Up in T2D")
  n_down <- sum(res$sig == "Down in T2D")
  message("  DEGs: ", n_up, " up, ", n_down, " down out of ", nrow(res), " genes")
  
  # ── 7. GSEA on Wald-equivalent (moderated t) ─────────────────────────────
  ranks <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))
  
  gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
  
  if (length(gene_ranks) < 50) {
    message("  Skipping GSEA for ", ct, " — too few ranked genes")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  gsea_res <- fgsea(
    pathways    = reactome_pathways,
    stats       = gene_ranks,
    minSize     = 15,
    maxSize     = 500,
    nPermSimple = 10000
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)
  
  gsea_list_biopsy[[ct]] <- gsea_res
  
  gsea_out <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  
  ct_clean <- gsub("[/ ]", "_", ct)
  ct_clean <- str_replace_all(ct_clean,"-","_")
  write.csv(gsea_out,
            file = file.path(dir_gsea_biopsy, paste0("gsea_reactome_biopsy_T2DvsLC_", ct_clean, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  message("  GSEA: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
}

# ── Combine all results ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (length(results_list_biopsy) > 0) {
  biopsy_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list_biopsy)
  write.csv(biopsy_all,
            file.path(dir_results_biopsy, "limma_biopsy_T2DvsLC_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

if (length(gsea_list_biopsy) > 0) {
  gsea_biopsy_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_list_biopsy) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  write.csv(gsea_biopsy_all,
            file.path(dir_gsea_biopsy, "gsea_reactome_biopsy_T2DvsLC_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

message("Biopsy limma analysis complete! Results saved to ", dir_results_biopsy)

biopsy_cell_counts <- table(so_kpmp_sc$celltype_LR) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  setNames(c("cell_type", "n_cells"))

write.csv(biopsy_cell_counts, "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC/cell_counts_per_celltype.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```

######Full Sample - T2D & LC
```{r}
biopsy_cell_counts <- table(so_biopsy$celltype_LR) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  setNames(c("cell_type", "n_cells"))

write.csv(biopsy_cell_counts, "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC_Full/cell_counts_per_celltype_full.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# ── Paths ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir_results_biopsy <- "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC_Full"
dir_gsea_biopsy    <- file.path(dir_results_biopsy, "GSEA","Full Dataset")
dir.create(dir_results_biopsy, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(dir_gsea_biopsy, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Reactome gene sets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
reactome_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")
reactome_pathways <- split(reactome_df$gene_symbol, reactome_df$gs_name)

# ── Cell types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
celltypes <- unique(so_biopsy$celltype_LR)

# ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
results_list_biopsy <- list()
gsea_list_biopsy    <- list()

# ── Loop ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (ct in celltypes) {
  
  message("Processing biopsy: ", ct)
  
  # ── 1. Subset to cell type ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  so_ct <- subset(so_biopsy, celltype_LR == ct)
  DefaultAssay(so_ct) <- "RNA"
  
  # check both groups present
  group_table <- table(so_ct$group)
  if (length(group_table) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only has: ", paste(names(group_table), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # check at least 2 samples per group
  sample_group <- so_ct@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(kit_id, group)
  samples_per_group <- table(sample_group$group)
  
  if (any(samples_per_group < 2)) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — need >=2 samples per group. Have: ",
            paste(names(samples_per_group), "=", samples_per_group, collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  # ── 2. Pseudobulk aggregation ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  pb_counts <- AggregateExpression(
    so_ct,
    assays       = "RNA",
    return.seurat = FALSE,
    group.by     = "kit_id"
  )$RNA
  
  pb_counts <- round(as.matrix(pb_counts))
  
  if (ncol(pb_counts) < 4) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few pseudobulk samples (n=", ncol(pb_counts), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 3. Sample metadata ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  col_data <- so_ct@meta.data %>%
    dplyr::distinct(kit_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(kit_id, group) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  rownames(col_data) <- col_data$kit_id
  
  # match column order
  pb_counts <- pb_counts[, rownames(col_data)]
  
  grp <- relevel(factor(col_data$group), ref = "Lean_Control")
  
  if (nlevels(grp) < 2) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — only 1 level in group")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 4. TMM normalization + filter ─────────────────────────────────────────
  dge  <- DGEList(counts = pb_counts)
  dge  <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
  keep <- filterByExpr(dge, group = grp)
  dge  <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(dge) < 10) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — too few genes after filtering (n=", nrow(dge), ")")
    next
  }
  
  # ── 5. Design + voom + fit ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  design <- model.matrix(~ grp)
  
  v    <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
  fit  <- lmFit(v, design)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit)
  
  # ── 6. Extract results ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  grp_coef <- grep("grp", colnames(fit2$coefficients), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(grp_coef) != 1) {
    message("  Skipping ", ct, " — unexpected coefficients: ",
            paste(colnames(fit2$coefficients), collapse = ", "))
    next
  }
  
  res <- topTable(fit2, coef = grp_coef, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      gene      = rownames(.),
      cell_type = ct,
      sig       = dplyr::case_when(
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC >  1 ~ "Up in T2D",
        adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < -1 ~ "Down in T2D",
        TRUE                           ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  results_list_biopsy[[ct]] <- res
  
  ct_clean <- str_replace_all(ct,"/","_")
  ct_clean <- str_replace_all(ct_clean,"-","_")
  write.csv(res,
            file = file.path(dir_results_biopsy, paste0("limma_biopsy_T2DvsLC_", ct_clean, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  n_up   <- sum(res$sig == "Up in T2D")
  n_down <- sum(res$sig == "Down in T2D")
  message("  DEGs: ", n_up, " up, ", n_down, " down out of ", nrow(res), " genes")
  
  # ── 7. GSEA on Wald-equivalent (moderated t) ─────────────────────────────
  ranks <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t) & is.finite(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(t))
  
  gene_ranks <- setNames(ranks$t, ranks$gene)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
  
  if (length(gene_ranks) < 50) {
    message("  Skipping GSEA for ", ct, " — too few ranked genes")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  gsea_res <- fgsea(
    pathways    = reactome_pathways,
    stats       = gene_ranks,
    minSize     = 15,
    maxSize     = 500,
    nPermSimple = 10000
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(cell_type = ct)
  
  gsea_list_biopsy[[ct]] <- gsea_res
  
  gsea_out <- gsea_res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  
  ct_clean <- gsub("[/ ]", "_", ct)
  ct_clean <- str_replace_all(ct_clean,"-","_")
  write.csv(gsea_out,
            file = file.path(dir_gsea_biopsy, paste0("gsea_reactome_biopsy_T2DvsLC_", ct_clean, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  message("  GSEA: ", sum(gsea_res$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE), " significant pathways")
}

# ── Combine all results ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (length(results_list_biopsy) > 0) {
  biopsy_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list_biopsy)
  write.csv(biopsy_all,
            file.path(dir_results_biopsy, "limma_biopsy_T2DvsLC_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

if (length(gsea_list_biopsy) > 0) {
  gsea_biopsy_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(gsea_list_biopsy) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(leadingEdge = sapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";"))
  write.csv(gsea_biopsy_all,
            file.path(dir_gsea_biopsy, "gsea_reactome_biopsy_T2DvsLC_allcelltypes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
}

message("Biopsy limma analysis complete! Results saved to ", dir_results_biopsy)

biopsy_cell_counts <- table(so_biopsy$celltype_LR) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  setNames(c("cell_type", "n_cells"))

write.csv(biopsy_cell_counts, "/home/hhampson/Results/Biopsy_Limma_T2DvsLC_Full/cell_counts_per_celltype.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```
